title: Chilli Garlic Tawa Chicken | Spicy Starter Recipe | चिली गार्लिक तवा चिकन फ्राई | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Power meets precision in every blend ❤️
Use my Coupon Code BLENDLABPRO2 for an instant discount only on Amazon.

Shop our BLP 2.0 here - https://curaahome.com/products/blendlabpro

Chilli Garlic Tawa Chicken

Prep time: 10-15 mins
Cooking time: 30-35 mins
Serves: 3-4 peoples

Ingredients:
CHICKEN BREAST | चिकन ब्रेस्ट 500 GRAMS

Marination:
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
VINEGAR | सिरका 1 TSP 
GINGER GARLIC GREEN CHILLI PASTE | अदरक लहसुन हरी मिर्च पेस्ट 1–1.5 TBSP 
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP
Gravy Base
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 15 NOS. (SOAKED IN HOT WATER)
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED 
OIL | तेल 2–3 TBSP
GARLIC | लहसुन 4 TBSP (CHOPPED)
RED CHILLI PASTE | लाल मिर्च पेस्ट 
CURD | दही 1/3 CUP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE 
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/2 TSP 
SPICY RED CHILLI POWDER | तीखी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP 
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH 
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH 
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH 
FRESH CORIANDER STEMS | हरा धनिया डंठल A HANDFUL (CHOPPED) 
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED) 
BUTTER | मक्खन AS REQUIRED

Method:
Cut the chicken into thin slices, the chicken cooks faster if cut into thin slices. 
Add the sliced chicken into a bowl, add all the ingredients of the marinade and mix well, you can optionally let the chicken marinade for an hour but it's not necessary. 
Make the red chilli paste by blending soaked kashmiri red chilli and water, make sure the paste is smooth and fine. 
Heat the tawa over high flame, let it get hot. 
Then add oil and let the oil heat up as well. 
Next, add the chopped garlic along with the prepared red chilli paste, stir well and then add whisked curd followed with all the powdered spices, salt and a splash of hot water, stir and cook the paste until the oil gets separated. 
Once the oil starts separating add a pinch of sugar to balance the flavours.
Once the paste is cooked, add hot water to adjust the consistency, then place the chicken slices evenly onto the tawa. 
Cook over medium high flame for 2-3 minutes on one side, thinly sliced chicken will get cooked quickly. 
Flip the chicken after cooking for 2-3 minutes, then cook similarly on the other side. 
Once the chicken is coat and coated with the masala add fresh coriander, fresh coriander stems and butter.
Your delicious Chilli Garlic Chicken Tawa Fry is ready, you can have it as a starter or you can also serve it with some toasted Pav.

title: Crispy Aloo Koliwada Recipe | Chatpate Fried Aloo | क्रिस्पी आलू कोलीवाड़ा | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Power meets precision in every blend ❤️

Shop our BLP 2.0 here - https://curaahome.com/products/blendlabpro

Written Recipe - Aloo Koliwada 

Prep time: 10-15 mins
Cooking time: 15-20 mins
Serves: 6-7 people

Parboiling Potatoes
POTATO | आलू 6-7 MEDIUM SIZED. 
SALT | नमक A LARGE PINCH 
Coating Mixture 
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1-1.5 TBSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/4 TSP
SPICY RED CHILLI POWDER | तीखी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP
CUMIN POWDER | जीरा पाउडर 1/4 TSP
CHAAT MASALA | चाट मसला 1/2 TSP
DRY MANGO POWDER | आमचूर पाउडर 1 TSP
BLACK SALT | काला नमक 1/4 TSP
ASAFOETIDA | हींग 1/4 TSP
CAROM SEEDS | अजवाइन 1/2 TSP
BLACK PEPPER POWDER | काली मिर्च पाउडर A LARGE PINCH
GINGER GARLIC GREEN CHILLI PASTE | अदरक लहसुन मिर्ची की पेस्ट 2 TBSP
CURD | दही 2 TBSP
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF A LEMON 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
BAKING SODA | बेकिंग सोडा A LARGE PINCH
GRAM FLOUR | बेसन 1.5 TBSP 
CORN FLOUR | कॉर्न फ्लोर 3 TBSP
ORGANIC RED FOOD COLOUR | आर्गेनिक लाल फूड कलर (OPTIONAL) 

Special Green Chutney:
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया 1/2 CUP
MINT | पुदीना 1 CUP
GARLIC | लेहसुन 3 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 1 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 4-5 NOS.
ONION | प्याज़ 1 SMALL SIZED. (ROUGHLY CUT)
TOMATO | टमाटर 1 SMALL SIZED. (ROUGHLY CUT)
TAMARIND | ईमली 1 TSP 
JAGGERY POWDER | गुड़ 1 TSP
BLACK SALT | काला नमक 1/2 TSP
CHAAT MASALA | चाट मसाला A LARGE PINCH
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
ICE CUBE | बर्फ 
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED


Method:
To make the chutney, just add all the ingredients into a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a fine paste. Do not add a lot of water, keep the chutney slightly thick.
Peel the potatoes and cut them into quarters. Add them to boiling water with a large pinch of salt and par-boil for exactly 5 minutes. They should not cook fully, a toothpick should enter the centre but with slight resistance.
Strain the potatoes and transfer them to a sieve. Let them cool completely so the coating sticks well later.
In a large mixing bowl, prepare the Koliwada coating. Add oil, all the powdered spices, ginger–garlic paste, whisked curd, lemon juice, baking soda, gram flour and corn flour. Whisk thoroughly to form a smooth, lump-free, thick paste.
If you want the classic red colour of Koliwada, mix in a little organic red food colour, this is optional and does not alter the taste.
Heat oil in a kadhai and bring it to 170°C.
Add the cooled par-boiled potatoes into the prepared coating. Use your hands to coat them lightly, the potatoes should have a thin, even coating.
Drop the coated potatoes into the hot oil in batches. Let them fry undisturbed for the first minute so the coating sets, then stir and fry on medium-low heat until crisp and golden.
Transfer the fried potatoes to a sieve so excess oil can drip off. Fry all remaining potatoes the same way.
Your super-crisp, chatpate Aloo Koliwada are ready. Serve hot with a squeeze of lemon and a sprinkle of chaat masala. Enjoy with the special Koliwada green chutney.

title: Tawa Bhindi Masala Recipe | Caterer Style Chatpati Bhindi | शादियों वाली तवा भिंडी | Sanjyot Keer
description:
A wooden classic that keeps your flavours in line ✨

Shop our Wooden Masala Dani now - https://amzn.in/d/dEnGWib

Written Recipe - Tawa Bhindi Masala
Prep time: 10-15 minutes
Cooking time: 35-40 minutes
Serves: 3-4 people

Ingredients:
Fried Bhindi
LADY FINGER | भिंडी 350–400 GRAMS
OIL | तेल 3–4 TBSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर A PINCH
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1/2 TSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/4 TSP
SALT | नमक 1/4 TSP
BLACK SALT | काला नमक 1/2 TSP
DRY MANGO POWDER | अमचूर पाउडर 1 TSP
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF 1/2 LEMON
Gravy
OIL | तेल 1–2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A LARGE PINCH
ONION | प्याज 2 MEDIUM SIZED
GINGER GARLIC PASTE | अदरक लहसुन पेस्ट 1 TBSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2–3 NOS.
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 TSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TBSP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
TOMATO | टमाटर 2 SMALL SIZED
CASHEW | काजू 15 NOS. (SOAKED / BOILED)
CURD | दही 2 TBSP (WHISKED)
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
Final Cooking
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
GINGER JULIENNE | अदरक के लच्छे A HANDFUL
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (SLIT)
FRESH CORIANDER STEMS | हरा धनिया डंठल A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Method:
Choose medium-sized lady fingers, and always check freshness by bending the tip, it should snap cleanly. 
Wash them well and then pat them completely dry using a cloth. Let them air-dry for 2–3 minutes so there is no surface moisture left. Moisture is what makes bhindi turn slimy during cooking. 
Once dry, trim the tops and make a single slit through the center of each bhindi, just enough to open and check if the inside is clean. Prepare all the bhindi like this.
Heat some oil in a fry pan, and once hot, add the slit bhindi. Fry them on medium heat until they become almost cooked and turn lightly golden. This step helps remove sliminess completely. 
Transfer the fried bhindi into a bowl. Prepare a spice mix by combining all the powdered spices in a separate bowl, then sprinkle this over the fried bhindi along with some lemon juice and coat them evenly. Keep 1–2 teaspoons of the spice mix reserved to use later in the gravy.
Place a fry pan on high heat and add oil. Once the oil warms up, add cumin seeds and let them crackle, then add finely chopped onions and sauté them until they turn golden brown. 
Add ginger garlic paste and chopped green chillies, and cook briefly until the raw smell disappears.
Lower the flame, then add Kashmiri red chilli powder, turmeric powder, and coriander powder. Immediately add a small splash of hot water so the spices do not burn. Stir everything and cook this masala until the oil begins to separate from the sides, indicating the spices are properly cooked.
Blend tomatoes with soaked cashews to form a smooth puree. Add this puree to the pan along with whisked curd and salt. Mix well and continue cooking until the oil separates again from the masala. If at any point the gravy becomes too thick or starts sticking, add some hot water and continue cooking.
Once the oil separates fully, add hot water to adjust the gravy to a semi-thick consistency. It should not be runny, just thick enough to coat the bhindi without turning it soggy.
Add the masala-coated fried bhindi into the gravy. Then add ginger juliennes, slit green chillies, chopped coriander stems, and fresh coriander. Gently fold everything together so the bhindi gets fully coated without breaking.
Your wedding-style Tawa Bhindi Masala is ready. Serve it hot with tandoori roti, paratha, or even steamed rice.

title: The BEST CHILLI CHICKEN with Basil Recipe | Soft Chicken Tips! बेसिल चिली चिकन रेसिपी | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Curaa ChopLab Lite! Your shortcut to effortless chopping 🫶🏻

Shop Now: https://amzn.in/d/9SSGeX4

The Best Chilli Chicken Recipe: https://youtu.be/UhSlMykeesQ?si=ugtJgaoPDZkDV2wr

Written recipe - Basil Chilli Chicken
Prep time: 10-15 mins
Cooking time: 25-30 minutes
Serves: 2-3 people

Ingredients:
Veggie Prep
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1 SMALL SIZED
ONION | प्याज़ 1 MEDIUM SIZED
SPRING ONION | हरा प्याज़ 1 NO.
GARLIC | लहसुन 15 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 3 NOS.
Velveting & Cooking Chicken
CHICKEN BREAST | चिकन ब्रेस्ट 350 GRAMS
BAKING SODA | बेकिंग सोडा A PINCH
WATER | पानी 3-4 TBSP
SALT | नमक A LARGE PINCH
LIGHT SOY SAUCE | लाइट सोया सॉस 1 TSP
WHITE PEPPER POWDER | सफ़ेद मिर्च पाउडर A PINCH
OIL | तेल 1 TSP
CORN FLOUR | कॉर्न फ्लोर 1–2 TBSP
OIL | तेल AS REQUIRED
Sauce & Final Cooking
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
LIGHT SOY SAUCE | लाइट सोया सॉस 2 TSP
DARK SOYA SAUCE | डार्क सोया सॉस 1 TSP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
WHITE PEPPER POWDER | सफ़ेद मिर्च पाउडर 1/4 TSP
SALT | नमक A PINCH
VINEGAR | सिरका 1/2 TSP
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
BASIL LEAVES | बेसिल के पत्ते A LARGE HANDFUL
SPRING ONION GREENS | हरा प्याज़ पत्ते A HANDFUL
Method:
Before starting any Indo-Chinese dish, prep all your ingredients completely — the sauce cooks fast, so everything must be ready beforehand.
Cut the capsicum by slicing off the sides and the bottom; discard the core and cut the planks into thin strips. Slice the onions into similar strips. Separate spring onion whites and greens — roughly chop the whites and finely chop the greens, keeping them in separate bowls. Coarsely chop ginger, garlic, and green chillies together in a chopper.
This is all the veggie prep you need for the recipe.
Cut the chicken into very thin slices, the breast is usually thicker from the top. Cut the chicken tender if it is attached to the breast first. 
Add baking soda and only 1-2 tbsp of water first, then using clean hands stir the chicken vigorously in a circular motion & allow the chicken pieces to absorb the water. This process is called velveting of the chicken. Repeat this process 2-3 times once the chicken absorbs the water. After repeating the process it will look like you have added egg whites to the chicken, it will turn slimy.
Once that's done, add salt, white pepper powder, soy sauce, oil & corn flour, mix well to coat the chicken, it only needs a very thin layer of coating.
To fry the chicken, heat oil in a kadhai or a wok until it gets moderately hot (165° C). Then carefully add the chicken in batches & fry over high flame until it turns light golden brown, it will only take 3-4 minutes for the chicken to cook so do not overcook it.
Remove the fried chicken into a sieve & fry the remaining batches similarly.
Before making the sauce, first mix cornflour and water to make a slurry and keep it ready.
Heat a wok on high flame, add oil, and let it get hot. Add the ginger–garlic–green chilli mix, spring onion whites, onion, and capsicum, then stir and sauté on high flame briefly. Add dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, a splash of hot water, white pepper, vinegar, salt, and sugar. Stir well and bring the sauce to a simmer.
Now add the fried chicken pieces along with the cornflour slurry (add the slurry gradually), stirring continuously so the chicken gets evenly coated and the sauce thickens and becomes glossy.
Finally, add freshly torn basil leaves and spring onion greens, toss well, and your Basil Chilli Chicken is ready.

title: Pyaaz Laccha Paratha Recipe | Tandoor Effect at Home | ढाबे जैसा प्याज लच्छा पराठा | Sanjyot Keer
description:
A wooden classic that keeps your flavours in line 😍

SHOP NOW - https://amzn.in/d/dEnGWib 

Written recipe - Pyaaz Laccha Paratha
Prep time: 25-30 minutes
Cooking time: 5-10 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Ingredients:
Dough
WHEAT FLOUR | गेहूं का आटा 2 CUPS
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED
OIL | तेल 1 TSP (for kneading)
OIL | तेल 1 TSP (for resting)
Onion Filling
ONION | प्याज 4 NOS.
SALT | नमक A LARGE PINCH
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 TSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1/4 TSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
BLACK SALT | काला नमक TO TASTE
CUMIN POWDER | जीरा पाउडर 1/4 TSP
AJWAIN | अजवाइन A PINCH (CRUSHED)
KALONJI | कलौंजी 1/4 TSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (CHOPPED)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
VINEGAR | सिरका 1 TSP
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
MUSTARD OIL | सरसों का तेल 1 TSP
Cooking
GHEE | घी AS REQUIRED
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A SMALL HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च TO TASTE (CHOPPED)


Method:
To make the dough, add wheat flour and salt to a bowl. Gradually add water and combine until all the dry flour comes together. Knead into a smooth, semi-soft dough, add 1 tsp oil, knead it in, shape into a dough ball, lightly oil the surface, cover with a damp cloth, and let it rest while you prepare the filling.
Thinly slice the onions from stem to root and place them in a bowl. Add a large pinch of salt and let them rest for a couple of minutes. Squeeze out the excess moisture and transfer the onions to a clean bowl. 
Add all the powdered spices, seasoning, fresh coriander, green chilli, vinegar, and mustard oil. Mix well, the onion filling itself tastes incredible.
Once the dough has rested, take a portion and shape it into a roundel. Roll it into a thin chapati. Add a generous amount of the onion filling in the centre. Make a single cut from the centre to the edge, roll the dough into a cone, then gently press it down to form a laccha pedha. Dust with wheat flour and roll into a semi-thick laccha paratha. Use extra flour as needed, the onion filling will make the dough sticky.
Heat a tawa over medium flame. Place the paratha on it and dry-cook from both sides until light brown spots appear. Then apply ghee on both sides and cook until the paratha turns golden brown, crisp, and flaky. Your tawa-style Pyaaz Laccha Paratha is ready.
To replicate a tandoor effect at home, make a laccha pedha the same way but without adding onion filling inside. Spread some ghee on the rolled dough, sprinkle wheat flour, roll into a cone again, press, and roll into a paratha. Spread a layer of the onion filling on top along with some fresh coriander and chopped green chillies, place a butter paper sheet over it, and gently press with a rolling pin so the filling sticks well.
Flip the paratha on the butter paper, so that you can apply water on the backside of the paratha. Use the butter paper to lift and stick the paratha onto a hot tawa, filling side up. Press with your fingers so it sticks well. 
Cook on high flame for 1–2 minutes. Then flip the tawa upside down and cook the paratha using direct flame until brown, slightly charred, and cooked through. Remove using a spatula. Your tandoor-style Pyaaz Laccha Paratha is ready, smoky and delicious on its own or with dahi and achaar.

description:

Vegetable Prep
Ingredients:
GARLIC | लहसुन 25–30 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 3 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 3 NOS.
CARROT | गाजर 1 NO.
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1 SMALL SIZED
FRENCH BEANS | फ्रेंच बीन्स 4–5 NOS.
BELL PEPPER | बेल पेपर 1 NO.
ONION | प्याज़ 1 MEDIUM SIZED.
SPRING ONION | हरा प्याज़ 2 NOS.
Method:
Chop the garlic, ginger & green chillies together using a string chopper or a knife if that is convenient & set it aside. The chopped ginger, garlic & green chilli mixture will be used to make both, the sauce & the rice.
Peel & roughly cut the carrot, roughly cut the bell pepper & french beans too, add them into the chopper & chop them coarsely. This veggie mixture will be used to make the fried rice.
Cut the bell pepper & onion into triangles for the sauce. You can use mixed bell peppers too for this recipe or you can only use one of your choice. 
Cut & separate the white & green portion of the spring onion, roughly chop the whites & finely chop the greens.
You will also need about 4 cups of cooked rice to make the fried rice, the link is mentioned above in the description.

Paneer in Hot Garlic Sauce
Ingredients:
PANEER | पनीर 350 GRAMS
OIL | तेल 1–2 TSP (for shallow frying) 
CORN FLOUR | कॉर्न फ्लोर 1–2 TBSP
WATER | पानी 2–3 TBSP
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP (for cooking sauce) 
RED CHILLI | लाल मिर्च 3–4 NOS.
RED CHILLI SAUCE | रेड चिली सॉस 2 TBSP
SCHEZWAN SAUCE | शेज़वान सॉस 1 TBSP
KETCHUP | केचप 1 TBSP
LIGHT SOY SAUCE | लाइट सोया सॉस 1 TSP
VINEGAR | सिरका 1/2 TSP
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
WHITE PEPPER | सफेद मिर्च पाउडर A PINCH
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
Method:
If the paneer block is thick, slice it into 2 slabs. Heat a nonstick pan with very little oil and shallow-fry the slabs until golden on both sides. Remove and let them cool slightly, then cut into cubes. This method is easier and keeps the cubes intact.
In a small bowl, mix corn flour with a little water to make a smooth slurry. Keep it ready before starting the sauce.
Heat a wok over high flame, add oil, and let it get hot. Add chopped ginger, garlic, green chilli, and whole spicy red chillies, save about a tablespoon of the garlic, ginger & green chillies for the fried rice. Sauté briefly, do not overcook the garlic, the flavour should stay sharp and aromatic.
Add onion petals, bell pepper petals, and spring onion whites. Stir-fry on high flame for a few seconds.
Add all the sauces, sugar, vinegar, white pepper, and salt. Mix well.
Lower the flame and add the prepared corn flour slurry while stirring continuously until the sauce thickens to a glossy consistency.
Add the fried paneer cubes and gently toss so they are coated well in the hot garlic sauce.
Add chopped spring onion greens, give a final mix, and turn off the heat.
Your Paneer in Hot Garlic Sauce is ready to serve!
Burnt Chilli Garlic Fried Rice
Ingredients:
OIL | तेल 1 TBSP
RED CHILLI | लाल मिर्च 2–3 NOS.
STAR ANISE | चक्र फूल 1–2 NOS.
LIGHT SOY SAUCE | लाइट सोया सॉस 1 TSP
VINEGAR | सिरका 1 TSP
COOKED RICE | पका हुआ चावल 4 CUPS
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
WHITE PEPPER POWDER | सफेद मिर्च पाउडर A LARGE PINCH
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
Method:
Place a wok or kadhai on high flame and let it get smoking hot. Add oil and allow it to heat thoroughly.
Add chopped ginger, garlic, green chilli, whole red chillies, and star anise. Sauté until the garlic and chillies turn lightly burnt for that signature burnt chilli–garlic flavour. Do not rush this step, but also do not completely burn or else the fried rice will turn bitter.
Add the chopped mixed vegetables. Stir-fry on high flame for 1–2 minutes. The veggies should stay crunchy.
Pour soy sauce around the edges of the wok (so it gets lightly charred), add vinegar, and mix well.
Add the cooked rice along with salt, sugar, and white pepper. Stir-fry on high flame for 2–3 minutes, ensuring everything is well combined.
Add a small splash of hot water and toss. This creates steam, helping the rice stay soft, moist, and fluffy.
Your Burnt Chilli Garlic Fried Rice is ready to serve!

title: Rajma Ke Kebab | Easy Rajma Tikki & Soup Recipe | मुँह में घुलने वाले राजमा के कबाब | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Rajma Ke Kebab (with Bonus soup recipe)

Prep time: 20 minutes 
Cooking time: 30 minutes
Serves: 3-4 people

Ingredients:
Rajma Kebab
For Boiling
CHITRA RAJMA | चित्रा राजमा 1 CUP
POTATO | आलू 2 MEDIUM SIZED
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED
SALT | नमक A LARGE PINCH
Kebab Mixture
GINGER | अदरक 2 TSP (CHOPPED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (CHOPPED)
MINT | पुदीना A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TBSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/2 TSP
DRY MANGO POWDER | अमचूर पाउडर 1 TSP
BLACK SALT | काला नमक 1 TSP
RED CHILLI FLAKES | रेड चिली फ्लेक्स TO TASTE
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
GHEE | घी 1/2 TSP (for cooking)
Method:
Wash and soak the rajma overnight. Discard the water from the soaked rajma and put them into a pressure cooker along with the halved potatoes, salt, and enough water, pressure cook for 3 whistles over medium flame.
Let the cooker depressurize, then check, the rajma should be completely soft and mashable.
Strain using a sieve and reserve the stock to make a quick soup later.
While still warm, mash the cooked rajma and potatoes together using a masher until smooth.

Once the mixture cools slightly, take a small portion and shape it into a roundel, then press gently into a tikki.
If it feels sticky or loose, grind some dry poha and add gradually to improve binding.
Add ginger, green chilli, mint, coriander, all powdered spices, black salt, and regular salt.
Mix thoroughly until the mixture is well combined and holds its shape.
Divide into equal portions, roll into roundels, and flatten slightly into tikkis. You can make about 15 kebabs, each weigh 50 grams using this recipe.
Heat a pan or tawa and brush it lightly with ghee.
Place the kebabs and cook over medium-low flame until golden brown and crisp on both sides.
Avoid adding too much ghee, excess fat can cause the kebabs to break apart.
Once perfectly golden, remove and serve hot with green chutney and rajma soup made from the reserved stock, a wholesome, protein-rich meal.

Special Green Chutney for Kebabs
Ingredients:
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A LARGE HANDFUL
MINT | पुदीना A HANDFUL
GARLIC | लहसुन 2 CLOVES
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS.
BLACK SALT | काला नमक 1/2 TSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A PINCH
ICE CUBE | बर्फ का टुकड़ा 1 NO.
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED
THICK CURD | गाढ़ा दही 1/2 CUP
Method:
Add all the ingredients of the chutney into a mixer jar and grind it into a thick, fine chutney using very little water.
In a bowl add the chutney along with the thick curd and whisk well to make a smooth chutney.
Your delicious & super flavorful green chutney is ready, perfect for kebabs and tikkis.

Quick Rajma Soup (using the stock)
Ingredients:
GHEE | घी 1 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A LARGE PINCH
GINGER | अदरक 1 TSP (CHOPPED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 1–2 NOS. (CHOPPED)
HING | हींग 1/4 TSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP
RAJMA STOCK | राजमा का पानी
BLACK SALT | काला नमक 1/2 TSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
DRY MANGO POWDER | अमचूर पाउडर A LARGE PINCH
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस 1/2 NO.
MINT | पुदीना A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Method:
Set a kadhai or a stock pot over high flame and let it get hot, then add ghee and let the ghee heat up as well.
Add the cumin seeds, let them crackle then add in ginger, green chilli, hing turmeric powder, kashmiri red chilli powder and rajma stock, stir well and add the remaining powdered spices, lemon juice, mint and fresh coriander, bring the soup to a boil.
Your delicious, quick and comforting Rajma Soup is ready.

title: Egg Pulao Recipe | EASY ONE-POT Egg Rice | एक ही कढ़ाई में बनाइये अंडा पुलाओ | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Checkout the ChopLab Lite here: https://amzn.in/d/9SSGeX4

Egg Pulao (Simple & Easy Anda Rice)

Prep Time: 20 minutes
Cooking Time: 30 minutes
Serves: 3–4 

Ingredients:
Washing Rice & Eggs Prep
BASMATI RICE | बासमती चावल 1 CUP
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED
EGGS | अंडे 6 NOS. (BOILED)

Prep
ONION | प्याज 3 NOS.
GARLIC | लहसुन 10–12 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 3 NOS.
MINT | पुदीना A LARGE HANDFUL
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A LARGE HANDFUL
TOMATO | टमाटर 1 NO.

Cooking
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
TOMATO | टमाटर 1 NO.
CURD | दही 1/4 CUP (WHISKED)
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP
BIRYANI MASALA | बिरयानी मसाला 2 TSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
FRESH CORIANDER & MINT | हरा धनिया और पुदीना A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
HOT WATER | गरम पानी 2 CUPS
SALT | नमक IF REQUIRED
FRESH CORIANDER & MINT (CHOPPED)

Method:
Boil and peel the eggs before starting the recipe for ease.
 Wash and soak the basmati rice until the water runs clear, let it soak while you prep the rest.
 In a string chopper, finely chop onion, garlic, ginger, and green chillies together, transfer to a bowl.
 In the same chopper, roughly chop mint and coriander & keep aside.
 Cut the tomato into large dices, they cook faster if cut into large chunks.
 Heat a heavy-bottomed flat vessel or kadhai. Once hot, add oil and let it get hot.
 Add cumin seeds and let them crackle.
 Add the chopped onion mixture and sauté over medium flame until golden brown.
 Add tomatoes, whisked curd, turmeric, chilli powder, biryani masala, and salt.
 Mix well and cook until the oil separates. Add a splash of hot water if required to continue cooking.
 Add chopped coriander and mint, stir and cook for another minute.
 Gently score the boiled eggs with a knife so they can absorb flavour & add them to the masala and stir gently to coat well.
 Using the same cup measure you used to measure the rice, pour 2 cups of hot water (for rice soaked 30 mins).
Then drain the soaked rice and add it to the masala. 
 Stir gently, taste, and adjust salt if needed.
 Once the pulao comes to a gentle simmer, sprinkle some more coriander and mint on top.
 Cover the vessel with a lid wrapped in a clean kitchen towel to trap the steam.
 Cook on the lowest flame for 12–15 minutes.
 Open and check, the rice should be cooked and no water should remain.
 If slightly undercooked, add a splash of hot water, cover again, and cook for a few more minutes.
 Once cooked, switch off the flame and let the pulao rest for 10–15 minutes, this step is very important.
 Gently fluff the rice with a spatula before serving & serve hot with some rait & onion salad.

title: होटल जैसा मशरूम बटर मसाला घर पर | Mushroom Butter Masala Restaurant Style Recipe | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Checkout the BlendLab Pro 2.0 here- https://amzn.in/d/99D7m46

Full written recipe - Mushroom Butter Masala 

Prep time: 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time: 30-35 minutes
Serves: 3-4 people

Ingredients:
Tomato Puree 
TOMATO | टमाटर 4 NOS. 
GARLIC | लेहसुन 10-12 CLOVES. 
GINGER | अदरक 1 INCH
CORIANDER STEMS | धनिया के डंठल 2 TBSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 1 NO. 
CASHEW | काजू 15 NOS. (SOAKED)

Tempering and Gravy Cooking
BUTTER | मक्खन 2 TBSP
OIL | तेल 1 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
GREEN CARDAMOM | हरी इलायची 1-2 NOS. 
CINNAMON | दालचीनी 1/2 INCH
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 2 NOS. 
ONION | प्याज़ 3 MEDIUM SIZED (CHOPPED)
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 2 TSP 
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (CHOPPED)
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH 
BUTTON MUSHROOM | बटन मशरूम 400 GRAMS
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
FRESH CREAM | फ्रेश क्रीम 3-4 TBSP
BUTTER | मक्खन 2 TBSP
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी हुई कसूरी मेथी पाउडर A PINCH
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A SMALL HANDFUL (CHOPPED)

Method:
Add the tomatoes, garlic, ginger & the remaining ingredients of the puree into a mixer jar & blend it into a fine tomato puree, keep it aside. 
Set a kadhai over high flame & let it get hot, then add butter & oil, let the butter melt & heat up.
Add the cumin seeds along with the remaining whole spices & onions, stir well & cook over medium high flame until the onions turn golden brown. 
Once the onions turn golden brown, lower the flame & add all the powdered spices with a splash of hot water, stir well & cook the masala over medium high flame for 2-3 minutes.
Add the prepared tomato puree along with salt & sugar, stir well & add the green chillies, then cover & cook over medium low flame for 5-7 minutes until the gravy gets cooked and the oil separates. 
Meanwhile, cut the mushrooms, trim the stem slightly, if the size of the mushroom is big then cut them into halves, keep the smaller mushrooms as is. 
Once the gravy is cooked, add the mushrooms, stir well & cook over high flame for 2-3 minutes. 
Next, add a splash of hot water, stir well & then cover & cook for 4-5 minutes. The mushrooms will release their moisture and give the body to the gravy, and they will get cooked too. 
Remove the lid, stir well & taste to adjust any seasoning if required.
Lastly, add fresh cream, butter, kasuri methi powder, garam masala and fresh coriander, stir well & your delicious, quick and easy Mushroom Butter Masala is ready, serve hot with Tandoori Roti or Rumali Roti.

title: Instant Rava Uttapam Recipe | Homemade Milagai Podi/Gun Powder | इंस्टेंट रवा उत्तपम | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Scoop the perfect amount, effortlessly 🙌

Measuring Spoon Link - https://amzn.in/d/51cjCMU

One Blender, Endless Possibilities ❤️

Shop now - https://amzn.in/d/bMOU6DL

Instant Rava Uttapam – 3 Ways

Prep time: 5-10 minutes
Cooking time: 5-10 minutes
Serves: 3-4 people

Milagai Podi
Ingredients:
URAD DAL | उरद दाल 1/4 CUP
CHANA DAL | चना दाल 2 TBSP
WHITE SESAME SEEDS | सफेद तिल 2 TBSP
BYADGI RED CHILLI | ब्यादगी मिर्च 6 NOS. 
SPICY RED CHILLI | तीखी लाल मिर्च 2 NOS. (OPTIONAL)
SALT | नमक 1 TSP
HING | हींग 1/4 TSP
Method:
Add the chana & urad dal into a pan & toast them over low flame until fragrant & then add the sesame seeds & toast them over low flame until they get slightly golden in colour & then transfer them into a bowl & cool them down completely.
Meanwhile add the chillies in the same pan & toast them over low flame until they get hot & crispy, then transfer them into a separate bowl & let them cool down.
Once cooled, break the stalks of the chillies & add them into a mixer grinder jar, grind the chillies into a fine powder.
Further add the toasted dals, sesame seeds, asafoetida & salt, grind everything coarsely, make sure you don’t make a fine powder.
Your gunpowder / milagai podi is ready, store it in an airtight container, keep it in the fridge & use it for a few months.

Uttapam
Ingredients:
Batter
UPMA RAWA | उपमा रवा 1 CUP
SOUR CURD | खट्टा दही 1/2 CUP
WATER | पानी 1 CUP 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
ENO | इनो 1 TSP
Ghee Podi Uttapam
GHEE | घी AS REQUIRED 
MILAGAI PODI | मोलगाइ पोड़ी AS REQUIRED 
Cheese Ghee Podi
GHEE | घी AS REQUIRED 
CHEESE | चीज़ AS REQUIRED
MILAGAI PODI | मोलगाइ पोड़ी AS REQUIRED 
SPRING ONION GREENS | हरे प्याज़ के पत्ते A HANDFUL (CHOPPED) 
Onion Tomato Uttapam
ONION | प्याज़ AS REQUIRED (CHOPPED)
TOMATO | टमाटर AS REQUIRED (CHOPPED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च AS REQUIRED (CHOPPED)
GHEE | घी AS REQUIRED 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
MILAGAI PODI | मोलगाइ पोड़ी AS REQUIRED 
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)  
Method:
In a large bowl add upma rawa, sour curd, water & salt, whisk well to make a lump-free batter, cover & let is rest for 15 minutes. This step is very crucial, the rawa need to rest & soak the moisture. While the batter is resting you can make the Molagai podi.
Once rested, the batter will become slightly thick, make sure that you use the perfect measurements.
Set a dosa tawa over medium flame & let it heat up.
Add eno to the batter & mix well, this will help the uttapam to rise while cooking.
Ghee Podi Uttapam
Once the dosa tawa is hot, sprinkle some water to balance the temperature, it should sizzle immediately and evaporate.
Pour a ladleful of the prepared batter onto the tawa and let it spread naturally into a thick round. Allow it to set slightly, then add ghee around the edges and on top.
Cover and cook on the lowest flame for 3–4 minutes, until the bottom turns golden and crisp while the top cooks through.
Uncover, add a little more ghee, and sprinkle a generous amount of molagai podi.
Your Ghee Podi Uttapam is ready to serve hot.

Cheese Ghee Podi Uttapam
Pour a ladleful of batter onto the tawa and allow it to spread slightly on its own. Top with grated cheese, cover, and cook on a low flame until the cheese melts and the base becomes crisp.
Uncover, drizzle ghee around the edges, and sprinkle molagai podi over the top. Garnish with spring onion greens.
Your Cheese Ghee Podi Uttapam is ready.

Onion Tomato Uttapam
Pour the batter onto the tawa and quickly top it with chopped onions, tomatoes, and green chillies. Sprinkle salt and add some ghee.
Cover and cook on a low flame until the base turns golden and crisp.
Remove the lid, add a little more ghee, and carefully flip the uttapam. Let the vegetables caramelize nicely.
Flip once again, add some more ghee, sprinkle milagai podi, and lastly add fresh coriander.
Your Onion Tomato Uttapam is ready.

title: Palak Paneer Bhurji Recipe with FRESH PANEER! पालक पनीर भुर्जी की ज़बरदस्त रेसिपी! Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Bring home the charm of tradition, one spice at a time ❤️

Shop our beautiful Wooden Masala Dani now & use my Coupon Code MASALABOX200 for an instant discount 🙌🛒

Link - https://amzn.in/d/3pr8kj6

Full written recipe - Palak Paneer Bhurji

Prep Time: 10 minutes
Cooking Time: 15-20 minutes
Serves: 3–4

Ingredients:

Homemade Paneer
FULL FAT MILK | फुल फैट दूध 1 LITRE 
VINEGAR | सिरका 2 TBSP
WATER | पानी 2 TBSP

Tempering & Cooking 
BUTTER | मक्खन 2 TBSP
OIL | तेल 2 TSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP 
BESAN | बेसन 1 TBSP 
ONION | प्याज़  2 MEDIUM SIZED. (CHOPPED)
TOMATO | टमाटर 2 NOS. (CHOPPED)
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (CHOPPED) 
SPINACH | पालक 1 BUNCH
MILK | दूध AS REQUIRED 
GINGER JULIENNE | अदरक के लच्छे HANDFUL 
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH 
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी पाउडर A PINCH
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)

Method:
Set milk to heat over medium-low flame in a stock pot. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
In a fry pan, heat butter and oil. Add cumin seeds and let them crackle.
Add besan and roast on low flame until golden and aromatic.
Add chopped onions and sauté briefly. Then add tomatoes, salt, powdered spices, and green chillies.
Add a splash of hot water and cook until the tomatoes turn mushy.
Roughly chop spinach and add it to the pan with a splash of hot water.
Cover and cook on low flame until spinach releases its moisture.
Open the lid and cook on high flame until all excess moisture evaporates and the spinach is cooked. Switch off the flame.
Once the milk comes to a gentle simmer, switch off the flame and let it cool slightly for 2–3 minutes.
Mix vinegar and water, add gradually to the milk while stirring gently until it curdles completely and paneer separates from the whey.
Strain the paneer and immediately add it into the cooked spinach mixture.
Switch on the flame and mix well. Add milk to adjust the consistency & keep it semi-thick.
Taste and adjust salt if required. Add ginger julienne, garam masala, roasted kasuri methi powder, and fresh coriander. Mix well. Your delicious Palak Paneer Bhurji is ready.
Sprinkle freshly crushed black pepper and chaat masala on top before serving.
Serve hot with laccha paratha or bread slices.

title: Shahi Matar Paneer Recipe | Caterer Style Recipe | शादियों वाला शाही मटर पनीर | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Get BLP 2.0 and use code ‘BLENDLABPRO2' for an instant discount on Amazon 🙌

Shop Now - https://amzn.in/d/99D7m46

Full written recipe - Shahi Matar Paneer

Prep Time: 15–20 minutes
Cooking Time: 35–40 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Base gravy:
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
GREEN CARDAMOM | हरी इलायची 2 PODS
BLACK CARDAMOM | बड़ी इलायची 1 NO.
CINNAMON | दालचीनी 1 INCH
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 2 NOS
ONION | प्याज़ 2 LARGE NOS. (SLICED)
TOMATO | टमाटर 4 MEDIUM SIZED (ROUGHLY CUT)
GARLIC | लहसुन 20–25 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS.
CORIANDER STEMS | धनिए की डंठल A LARGE HANDFUL
SALT | नमक A PINCH
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 2 NOS.
CASHEW | काजू 20–25 NOS.
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED

Frying Paneer:
PANEER | पनीर 300–350 GRAMS
OIL | तेल 1 TBSP
WARM WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
SALT | नमक A PINCH

Final Cooking:
OIL | तेल 1 TBSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TBSP
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
GREEN PEAS | हरे मटर 1 CUP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
FRESH CREAM | फ्रेश क्रीम 2 TBSP
BUTTER | मक्खन 1 TBSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी पाउडर A PINCH
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)

Method:
Heat oil in a kadhai or a saucepan, add all the whole spices and let them crackle. Add onions and sauté until translucent. 
Then add tomatoes, garlic, ginger, green chillies, coriander stems, salt, red chillies, and cashews. Mix well and cook on high flame for 3–4 minutes.
Add hot water, cover and cook until the tomatoes turn completely mushy.
Once cooked, allow the mixture to cool completely and blend into a smooth puree using water as required.
Cut paneer into large slabs and shallow fry them in a non-stick pan until lightly golden on both sides. Then cut into smaller cubes for serving convenience.
Soak the fried paneer pieces in warm salted water to keep them soft until ready to use.
Heat oil in a kadhai, make a paste by mixing turmeric, red chilli powder, and coriander powder in a little water. Add this spice paste to the oil and cook briefly.
Add the prepared gravy, season with salt and sugar, and cook for 4–5 minutes on medium flame until the oil separates slightly.
Add green peas, cover and cook on low flame until the peas are soft. Adjust consistency with hot water if needed.
Once the peas are cooked, add soaked paneer cubes and gently stir. Add butter, fresh cream, garam masala, roasted kasuri methi powder, and fresh coriander.
Mix well and simmer briefly.
Your rich and creamy Shahi Matar Paneer is ready, best served with tandoori roti, naan, paratha, or jeera rice.

title: Instant Fruit Rabdi IN MINUTES! Custard Fruit Salad Recipe | इंस्टेंट फ्रूट रबड़ी | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Get the ChopLab Pro and use code ‘CHOPLAB200’ for an instant discount on Amazon 🙌

Shop now - https://amzn.in/d/bDFH2Jy

Full written recipe - Instant Fruit Rabdi

Prep time: 10 mins
Cooking time: 15-20 minutes
Serves: 6-8 people

Ingredients:
MAKHANA | मखाना 50 GRAMS
GHEE | घी 1 TSP
FULL FAT MILK | फुल फैट दूध 1.5 LITRES
SAFFRON | केसर A PINCH
VANILLA ESSENCE | वनीला एसेंस 1 TSP
ALMONDS | बादाम 2 TBSP
CASHEW | काजू 2 TBSP
CONDENSED MILK | कंडेंस्ड मिल्क 3/4 CUP / 250 GRAMS
APPLE | सेब 1 MEDIUM SIZED (DICED)
GRAPES | अंगूर 8-10 NOS. (DICED)
POMEGRANATE | अनार 1/2 CUP
CHIKOO | चीकू 2 NOS. (DICED)
BANANA | केला 1 LARGE (DICED)
Method:
Roast the makhana in ghee over medium heat until light and crisp. Transfer to a plate, cool completely, and grind the entire quantity into a fine powder using an electric chopper.
In a heavy-bottomed kadhai, bring the milk to a gentle boil, then reduce the flame and let it simmer for 10–12 minutes.
Add the makhana powder, whisking continuously to avoid lumps. Then add saffron, vanilla essence, and the nuts. Cook for 5 minutes on low flame.
Add condensed milk, stir well, and continue to cook for 2–3 minutes until the rabdi reaches a semi-thick consistency. The rabdi will thicken further after cooling.
Turn off the flame and let the rabdi cool down completely. Once chilled, fold in all the diced fruits.
Add fruits only right before serving to retain freshness and texture. If serving in batches, mix fruits in portions as needed.
Garnish with slivered pistachios and pomegranate. Delicious fruit rabdi is ready to be served to your guests this festive season.

title: Sev Tamatar Ki Sabzi | Spicy Kathiyawadi Recipe | काठियावाड़ी सेव टमाटर की सब्ज़ी | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Classic design, Modern convenience ❤️ 
Shop Cüraa Kettle now! ✨🛒

Amazon - https://amzn.in/d/1Wn8F9P

Website - https://curaahome.com/products/beige-curaa-kettle

Kathiyawadi Sev Tamatar ki Sabzi

Prep Time: 10 minutes
Cooking Time: 20 minutes
Serves: 3-4 people

Ingredients:
GROUNDNUT OIL | मूंगफली का तेल 3 TBSP
MUSTARD SEEDS | राई 1/2 TSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1/2 TSP
HING | हींग 1/4 TSP
CURRY LEAVES | कड़ी पत्ता 8-10 NOS.
GARLIC | लहसुन 6 CLOVES (ROUGHLY CHOPPED)
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH (GRATED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (CHOPPED)
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP 
TOMATO | टमाटर 6 NOS. (SMALL DICES)
SALT | नमक A PINCH
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP
CUMIN POWDER | जीरा पाउडर 1/2 TSP 
GARLIC CHUNTEY | लहसुन की चटनी 1 TSP (OPTIONAL)
JAGGERY | गुड़ 1 TSP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
SEV | सेव 1 CUP
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धानिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH 

Method:

Heat oil in a kadhai. Add mustard seeds, cumin seeds, hing, curry leaves, garlic, ginger, and green chilli. Sauté briefly until fragrant.
Add turmeric powder and 1 tsp Kashmiri red chilli powder, stir quickly for colour.
Add diced tomatoes (reserve a handful to be added later). Cook on high flame for 3–4 minutes.
Cover and cook on low flame for 4–5 minutes until tomatoes turn completely soft and mushy.
Remove lid and mash the tomatoes slightly. Add coriander powder, remaining Kashmiri red chilli powder, cumin powder, and garlic chutney (if using). Cook until oil begins to separate.
Add the reserved tomatoes along with jaggery. Stir well.
Pour in hot water to adjust consistency, bring to a boil, and simmer for 3–4 minutes until well cooked and oil separates again.
Add a little more hot water (as sev absorbs liquid). Adjust salt to taste.
Add sev, fresh coriander, and a pinch of garam masala. Stir gently and cook briefly.
Serve hot with roti or bread of your choice.

Ingredients:

SALT | नमक TO TASTE
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/2 TSP
CURD | दही 2 TBSP
OIL | तेल 2 TSP
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED (ADDED GRADUALLY)
For cooking
OIL | तेल 2-3 DROPS
WHEAT FLOUR | गेहूं का आटा
GHEE | घी 1/2 TSP

Method:
Remove the leaves from the stems, wash thoroughly, pat dry, and chop them finely.
In a large mixing bowl, add wheat flour, jowar flour, gram flour, chopped moringa leaves, ajwain, hing, sesame seeds, ginger-green chilli paste, salt, turmeric, red chilli powder, garam masala, curd, and oil. Mix everything well before adding water.
Gradually add water and knead into a soft, smooth dough. 
Apply a little oil on the surface, cover with a damp cloth, and let it rest for 15–20 minutes.
Heat a tawa over medium-high flame.
Take a small portion of dough, roll it into a round ball, then dust with dry wheat flour and roll into a thin, round thepla using a rolling pin.
Once the tawa is hot, add 2–3 drops of oil, wipe it clean, sprinkle a little wheat flour, and wipe again. This prevents the thepla from sticking.
Place the rolled thepla on the hot tawa. Dry roast on both sides until you see light spots, then add very little ghee and cook quickly over high heat. Avoid overcookin, this helps the thepla stay soft.
Serve hot moringa theplas with white butter, dahi, and pickle.

title: Makhana Kheer Recipe | Navratri Vrat Special Sweet | व्रत स्पेशल मखाने की खीर | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Shop Now - https://amzn.in/d/57S1QMy

Full written recipe - Vrat Special Makhana Kheer

Prep Time: 10 minutes
Cooking Time: 25 minutes
Serves: 4


Ingredients:
GHEE | घी 1 TSP
MAKHANA | मखाना 50 GRAMS / 2 CUPS
FULL FAT MILK | दूध 1 LITRE
KESAR | केसर A PINCH
CARDAMOM POWDER | इलायची पाउडर 1/4 TSP
ROSE WATER | गुलाब जल 1/2 TSP
PISTACHIO | पिसता 1 TBSP (SLIVERED)
ALMOND | बदाम 1 TBSP (SLIVERED)
CASHEW | काजू 1 TBSP (CHOPPED)
CONDENSED MILK | कंडेंस्ड मिल्क 1/2 CUP / 160 GRAMS
For garnish
PISTACHIO | पिसता 
DRY ROSE PETALS | सूखे गुलाब की पंखुड़ियां 



Method:

Heat ghee in a kadhai and roast the makhana on low flame until crisp and aromatic. Transfer to a bowl and let cool slightly.
Grind half of the roasted makhana into a coarse powder using a chopper or grinder, while keeping the rest whole.
In the same kadhai, add milk and bring it to a boil. Stir occasionally to prevent it from sticking.
Add the prepared makhana powder to the boiling milk and whisk well to avoid lumps.
Stir in saffron, cardamom powder, rose water, and the nuts. Let the mixture simmer on low flame for 12–15 minutes. The makhana powder will help thicken the kheer.
Add condensed milk, mix well, and cook until you reach your desired consistency. The kheer will thicken further as it cools.
Finally, add the remaining whole makhana, stir, and cook for 2–3 minutes.
Your vrat-special Makhana Kheer is ready. Serve warm for comfort or chilled for a creamy, rich dessert.

title: Kaju Makhana Curry | NO ONION NO GARLIC Recipe | बिना प्याज़ लहसुन की काजू मखाना करी | Sanjyot Keer
description:
One Blender, Endless Possibilities ❤️

Shop now - https://curaahome.com/products/curaa-blendlab

Amazon - https://amzn.in/d/bajnap2

Kaju Makhana Curry (No onion, No garlic)
Prep Time: 15 minutes
Cooking Time: 20-25 minutes
Serves: 4 people

Ingredients:
Base Gravy
TOMATO | टमाटर 4 MEDIUM SIZED
CASHEWS | काजू 20-25 NOS.
FRESH CORIANDER STEMS | हरा धनिया डंठल A HANDFUL
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS.
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 3-4 NOS.
SALT | नमक A LARGE PINCH
GREEN CARDAMOM | हरी इलायची 3 PODS
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 1 NO.
CINNAMON | दालचीनी 2 INCH STICK
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED

Frying Cashew & Makhana
GHEE | घी 1 TBSP
OIL | तेल 1 TSP
CASHEW | काजू 30-35 NOS.
MAKHANA | मखाना 2 CUPS (50 GRAMS)

Tempering & Final Cooking
BUTTER | मक्खन 1 TBSP
OIL | तेल 1 TSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A LARGE PINCH
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/4 TSP
SALT | नमक IF REQUIRED
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
GINGER JULIENNE | अदरक के लच्छे 1 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 1-2 NOS. (SLICED)
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुना कसूरी मेथी पाउडर A PINCH
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Method:
In a kadhai, add tomatoes, cashews, coriander stems, green chilli, ginger, Kashmiri red chillies, a large pinch of salt, green cardamom, bay leaf, and cinnamon. Pour in enough hot water to cover the ingredients, cover with a lid, and boil until the tomatoes turn completely mushy.
In a separate kadhai, heat ghee and oil together. Fry the cashews until golden and remove them. In the same pan, fry the makhana until crisp. Transfer both to a bowl and set aside.
Once the tomato mixture cools down completely, discard the whole spices and blend into a smooth puree using water as required.
Heat butter and oil in a kadhai. Add cumin seeds and let them crackle. Stir in turmeric powder, Kashmiri red chilli powder, and garam masala. Pour in the prepared tomato cashew puree and cook well until the colour deepens and the oil begins to separate. Season with sugar and adjust salt if needed.
Add the fried cashews and makhana to the gravy. Stir in ginger julienne, sliced green chilli, roasted kasuri methi powder, a pinch of garam masala, and fresh coriander. Add hot water if required to adjust consistency. Simmer briefly.
Your rich, No Onion No Garlic Kaju Makhana Curry is ready. Serve hot with roti, naan, or paratha of your choice.

Full written recipe - Punjabi Paneer Curry 
Prep Time: 20 minutes
Cooking Time: 30-35 minutes
Serves: 3-4 people

Ingredients:
Base Gravy
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A LARGE PINCH
ONION | प्याज़ 3 LARGE (SLICED)
TOMATO | टमाटर 2 NOS. (ROUGHLY CHOPPED)
CORIANDER STEM | धनिए कि डंठल A HANDFUL
GARLIC | लहसुन A HANDFUL / 20 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 4 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
HOT WATER A SPLASH 
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED 

Tempering 
GHEE | घी 1 TBSP
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 2 NOS. 
GREEN CARDAMOM | हरी इलायची 3 NOS. 
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1/2 TSP
BLACK CARDAMOM | बड़ी इलायची 1 NO. 
CINNAMON | दालचीनी 2 INCH
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER| कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1.5 TBSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP 
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 2 TBSP
SPICY RED CHILLI POWDER | तीखी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP 
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH

Frying Paneer
PANEER | पनीर 300-350 GRAMS 
OIL | तेल AS REQUIRED 

Final Ingredients
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी पाउडर A PINCH
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2-3 (SLICED)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धानिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)

Method:
Heat oil in a kadhai, add a large pinch of cumin seeds and let them splutter.
Add sliced onions and cook until golden brown.
Now add tomatoes, coriander stems, garlic, ginger, green chillies, and salt. Sauté for a few minutes.
Splash some hot water, cover the pan, and cook until the tomatoes turn soft and mushy.
Switch off the flame, let it cool slightly, then blend into a smooth puree using water as required.
Heat ghee in a kadhai, add bay leaves, green cardamom, cumin seeds, black cardamom, and cinnamon. Sauté until fragrant.
Add the prepared puree. Stir well and add Kashmiri red chilli powder, turmeric, coriander powder, and spicy red chilli powder.
Cook the masala well on medium flame until the gravy darkens and oil starts separating.
Adjust consistency with hot water, season with salt and a pinch of sugar, cover, and let it simmer gently.
Meanwhile, heat oil in a pan and shallow fry the paneer pieces until golden on both sides then add the fried paneer to the simmering gravy.
Lastly add roasted kasuri methi powder, garam masala, and sliced green chillies. Stir gently and add fresh coriander.
Your delicious Punjabi Paneer Curry is ready serve hot with tandoori roti, naan, paratha, or steamed rice.

title: Veg Cheese Chilli Corn Grill Sandwich Recipe | चीज़ चिली कॉर्न ग्रील सैंडविच | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:

Our Website - https://curaahome.com/products/curaa-choplab-lite

Shop now 🛍️

Full written recipe - Veg Chilli Cheese Corn Sandwich 

Prep time: 10 minutes
Cooking time: 10 minutes
Serves: 4-5 people 

Sandwich Chutney
Ingredients:
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया 1 BUNCH
CURRY LEAVES | कड़ी पत्ता 10 NOS. 
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 10-12 NOS. 
GARLIC | लहसुन 10-15 CLOVES
SANDWICH MASALA | मसाला 1 TSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
BREAD SLICE | ब्रेड स्लाइस 1 NO.
ICE CUBE | बर्फ 1-2 NOS. 
WATER | पानी A SPLASH 

Method:
Add all the ingredients of the chutney in a mixer jar and grind it into a thick and fine chutney, do not use a lot of water.
Taste and adjust salt if required and your streety style sandwich chutney is ready.

Grill Sandiwch
Ingredients:
ONION | प्याज़ 2 MEDIUM SIZED. 
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1 MEDIUM SIZED. 
RED BELL PEPPER | लाल शिमला मिर्च 1 MEDIUM SIZED. 
SWEET CORN | स्वीट कॉर्न 1 CUP
SANDWICH CHUTNEY | सैंडविच चटनी 2 TBSP
OREGANO | ऑरिगेनो 1 TSP 
RED CHILLI FLAKES | रेड चिली फ्लेक्स 1/2 TSP
SANDWICH MASALA | सैंडविच मसाला A LARGE PINCH
PROCESSED CHEESE | प्रोसेस्ड चीज़ 100 GRAMS
For assembly 
SANDWICH BREAD SLICES | सैंडविच ब्रेड स्लाइस 
SOFT BUTTER | नरम मक्खन AS REQUIRED
SANDWICH CHUTNEY | सैंडविच चटनी AS REQUIRED 
PANEER | पनीर AS REQUIRED (OPTIONAL)
SANDWICH MASALA | सैंडविच मसाला
BUTTER | मक्खन AS REQUIRED

Method:
Prepare the Filling:
Finely chop onion, capsicum, red bell pepper and sweet corn (using a string chopper or knife) and transfer to a mixing bowl.
Add sandwich chutney, oregano, red chilli flakes, sandwich masala, and grated cheese. Mix well to make the filling.
If you are not assembling immediately, add seasoning later to avoid the filling becoming watery.
Heat a grill pan or tawa on medium flame.
Take 3 bread slices, spread butter and sandwich chutney on all.
On 2 slices, spread a generous layer of the prepared filling.
Add grated paneer (optional) and sprinkle some sandwich masala.
Stack the slices and cover with the 3rd slice, pressing gently to seal.
Apply butter on the hot pan, place the sandwich, and press lightly with a plate to replicate a grill press.
Toast until the bottom side is crisp and golden, then apply butter on the top slice, flip, and cook the other side the same way.
Once both sides are golden and crisp, remove from pan.
Cut into halves or quarters and serve hot with chutney and ketchup.

title: Akkha Masoor Recipe | Maharashtrian Dhaba Style Spicy Dal | ढाबे जैसी अख्खा मसूर दाल | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Kanda Lahsun Masala: https://youtu.be/mAPVMr4S1bg?si=JjHX9hw2tLFJC5nA

Akkha Masoor (Maharashtrian Dhaba Style Dal)

Prep time: 10 minutes (plus 1–2 hours soaking, optional)
Cooking time: 25–30 minutes
Serves: 3–4

Ingredients:
Boiling Dal
KAALI MASUR | साबुत काली मसूर 1 CUP (SOAKED FOR 1-2 HOURS)
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED (1 INCH ABOVE THE DAL)
SALT | नमक A PINCH
Tempering 
OIL | तेल 2-3 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
ONION | प्याज़ 3 LARGE SIZED. (CHOPPED)
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1.5 TBSP
KANDA LAHSUN MASALA | कांदा लहसुन मसाला 1 TBSP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
2nd Tempering 
GARLIC | लहसुन 20 CLOVES 
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 1 NO.
OIL | तेल 1.5 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A LARGE PINCH
ASAFOETIDA | हींग 1/4 TSP 
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)

Method:
Wash and soak the sabut kaali masur (whole black masoor dal) for 1–2 hours (optional, but helps it cook faster).
Add the soaked dal to a pressure cooker with enough water (about 1 inch above the dal) and a pinch of salt.
If soaked, pressure cook for 1 whistle over medium flame.
If unsoaked, cook for 2–3 whistles.
Once cooked, switch off the flame, let the cooker depressurize naturally open and check the dal, set aside without discarding the cooking liquid.
Heat oil in a kadhai. Add cumin seeds and let them splutter.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they turn golden brown.
Lower the flame, add turmeric powder, Kashmiri red chilli powder, and kanda lahsun masala. Splash in a little hot water and cook briefly to prevent burning.
Add the boiled dal, mix well and let it simmer gently.
Once the dal thickens, mash it slightly with the back of a ladle to release more starch and make it creamier.
Crush the garlic cloves and green chilli into a rough paste using a mortar and pestle.
Heat oil in a small pan. Add the garlic–chilli paste and sauté until golden.
Add a pinch of cumin seeds, asafoetida, and Kashmiri red chilli powder. Stir briefly and immediately pour this tadka over the simmering dal.
Stir the dal well, taste, and adjust salt if required.
Garnish with freshly chopped coriander leaves.
Serve the Akkha Masoor hot with bhakri or steamed rice for a wholesome meal. #YFL #SanjyotKeer #akkhamasoor

title: Paneer Kali Mirch Recipe | Easy Hotel Style White Gravy | होटल जैसा पनीर काली मिर्च | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Shop now - https://amzn.in/d/26qW3XH

Full written recipe - Paneer Kali Mirch

Prep time: 10 minutes
Cooking time: 25 minutes
Serves: 3–4 people 

Base Gravy
ONION | प्याज़ 3 MEDIUM SIZED (ROUGHLY CUT)CASHEW | काजू 25–30 NOS.
MELON SEEDS | खरबूजे के बीज 1 TBSP
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GARLIC | लहसुन 20 CLOVES
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS.
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 2 NOS.
BLACK CARDAMOM | बड़ी इलायची 1 NO.
GREEN CARDAMOM | हरी इलायची 2–3 NOS.CINNAMON | दालचीनी 1 INCH
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED

Tempering the gravy
BUTTER | मक्खन 2 TBSP
OIL | तेल 1 TSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 1 NO. (SLIT)
GINGER JULIENNE | अदरक के लच्छे 1 INCH
FRESH CORIANDER STEMS | हरा धनिया के डंठल 2 TBSP (CHOPPED)
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
SUGAR | शक्कर 1 TSP
BLACK PEPPER | काली मिर्च 1 TSP (FRESHLY CRUSHED)
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED

Preparing Paneer & Final Cooking
OIL | तेल AS REQUIRED
PANEER | पनीर 300–350 GRAMS
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुना कसूरी मेथी पाउडर
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH

For garnish
ROGAN | रोगन
BLACK PEPPER | काली मिर्च
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया 

Method:
In a kadhai, add roughly cut onions, cashews, melon seeds, ginger, garlic, green chillies, tej patta, black cardamom, green cardamoms, and cinnamon.
Pour in enough hot water to cover the ingredients. Cover and cook on medium flame for 10–15 minutes, or until everything turns soft and well cooked.
Remove from heat and allow the mixture to cool completely. Discard the whole spices (tej patta, black cardamom, green cardamom, and cinnamon) if you prefer a smoother flavor.
Transfer to a mixer grinder and blend into a smooth, fine puree. Keep aside.
Heat 2 tablespoons butter and 1 teaspoon oil in a kadhai. Add the slit green chilli, ginger julienne, and chopped fresh coriander stems. Sauté briefly until fragrant.
Add the prepared base gravy and mix well. Season with salt, sugar, and freshly crushed black pepper.
Stir and add hot water as required to adjust the consistency. Let the gravy simmer gently until you fry or prepare the paneer.
Heat a little oil in a separate pan. Shallow fry the paneer pieces until golden brown from both sides. (Paneer can also be added directly to the gravy, but shallow-fried paneer holds its structure better.)
Add the fried paneer into the simmering gravy. Lastly add roasted kasuri methi powder and a pinch of garam masala. Stir well to coat the paneer.
Taste and adjust seasoning if required.
Your rich and creamy Paneer Kali Mirch is ready. Serve hot with naan, rumali roti, or any Indian bread of your choice.

title: Haryali Tawa Pulao Recipe | Mumbai Street Style Green Pulao | हरियाली तवा पुलाओ | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Hariyali Tawa Pulao

Prep time: 15-20 minutes
Cooking time: 35-40 minutes
Serves: 4-5 people

Ingredients:
For Rice
SELLA BASMATI | सेला बासमती चावल 1 CUP
SALT | नमक A LARGE PINCH
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
Spinach Paste
SPINACH LEAVES | पालक 1 SMALL BUNCH
SALT | नमक A PINCH
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A SMALL HANDFUL
MINT | पुदीना 10–13 LEAVES
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GARLIC | लहसुन 10–12 CLOVES
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS.
Taw Pulao
BUTTER | मक्खन 2 TBSP
OIL | तेल 1 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A LARGE PINCH
ONION | प्याज़ 1 MEDIUM-SIZED (SLICED)TOMATO | टमाटर 1 SMALL-SIZED
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1 MEDIUM-SIZED.CABBAGE | पत्ता गोभी A LARGE HANDFUL
GREEN PEAS | मटर 1/3 CUP (BOILED)
POTATO | आलू 1 NO. (BOILED & DICED)
PAV BHAJI MASALA | पाव भाजी मसाला 2 TSPTURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSPCORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
KASURI METHI | कसूरी मेथी A PINCHLEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF A SMALL LEMON
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
Method:
Wash the basmati rice 3-4 times until the added water turns clear & soak it for 30-45 minutes.
Add water into a large stock pot & bring it to a rolling boil & add the salt & turmeric powder.
Further drain out the water from the soaked rice & add the rice into the stock pot, stir it gently & cook until they are almost cooked. 
To check the rice just take out & bite into a few grains, they should be cooked but still have a slight bite, strain the rice out using a large spider or a sieve & transfer it onto a large sieve or a plate.
After you have transferred all the rice, fluff it up using a fork so that all the excess steam escapes & the carry forward cooking stops. Let the rice rest & cool down completely. Meanwhile yo in can do the other prep.
Blanc the spinach in hot water for 15-20 seconds then transfer it into ice cold water.
Add the blacnhed spinach into a mixer jar along with the remaining ingredients of the paste & blend it into a fine paste. 
Set a tawa or any flat bottomed vessel over high flame & let it get hot. 
Add butter & oil, let it heat up & then add cumin seeds & onions, stir well & cook the onion over high flame until they turn slightly light golden brown. 
Then add all the remaining veggies, stir well & cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the spinach paste along with all the powdered spices, salt & sugar, add a splash of hot water & cook all the ingredients for 3-4 minutes. 
Then add the cooled down rice, along with kasuri methi, lemon juice, garam masala & fresh coriander, stir well.
Your delicious Hariyali Tawa Pulao is ready, serve hot with some raita.

title: SURAT'S FAMOUS Tameta Puri | Tomato Bhajiya Recipe | सूरत का मशहूर टोमैटो भजिया | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Surat's Famous Tameta Puri (Tomato Bhajiya)

Prep time: 5-10 mins
Cooking time: 15-20 minutes 
Serves: 5-6 people 

Besan Batter:

GRAM FLOUR | बेसन 1.5 CUPS 
AJWAIN | अजवायन 1/2 TSP 
BAKING SODA | बेकिंग सोडा A PINCH 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE WATER | पानी 
AS REQUIRED (ADDED GRADUALLY)
Green Chutney:
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया 1 SMALL BUNCH 
MINT | पुदीना A SMALL HANDFUL 
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 6 NOS. 
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH 
GARLIC | लहसुन 6 CLOVES (OPTIONAL)
GATHIYA | गाठिया 3 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | ज़ीरा 1/2 TSP
CHAAT MASALA | चाट मसाला 1/2 TSP
SUGAR | चीनी 1 TSP
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF A SMALL LEMON ICE CUBES | बर्फ 2 NOS.
For Bhajiya:
TOMATOES | टमाटर AS REQUIRED
Method:
Sieve & add the gram flour into a large bowl along with salt, carom seeds & baking soda, mix all the dry ingredients.
Further add water & start whisking the batter, don’t add too much water at once, only add a little amount initially & whisk until all the lumps are gone.
Further add more water & adjust the consistency, the batter should be of a flowing consistency, not too thick nor too thin. Once the batter is ready cover & set it aside & let it rest until you make the other components.
Make the chutney by adding all the ingredients into a mixer grinder jar & grind it into a thick coarse chutney, do not add excess water, this chutney needs to be thick.
Cut the tomatoes into 1.5-2 cm thick slices. Make sure to use firm tomatoes.
Then add a spoonful of the chutney onto the slice & layer it, ready all the tomato slices similarly.
Once all the chutney layered tomato slices are ready, whisk the batter once.
Then add the slices into the besan batter & coat them using your fingers, then gently add the bhajiyas into 160°C hot oil, fry over medium high flame until they turn light golden brown, fry in batches. 
Once they are light golden brown, remove them onto a sieve & let them cool down completely.
Once cooled double fry them in hot oil for 1-2 minutes to make them super crisp. Once fried remove them onto a sieve.
Serve hot, but eat the bhajiyas very carefully as they are extremely hot on the inside, so cut them & then take a bit.

*3 High-Protein Veg Starter Recipes - Soya Schezwan Dry, Soya Manchurian, Crispy Soya Honey Chilli*

*For each individual starter recipe:*
Prep time: 10 minutes
Cooking time: 20 minutes
Serves: 4-5 people

*Ingredients:*
GARLIC | लहसुन 15–20 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 1 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 3 NOS.
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1 MEDIUM SIZED
ONION | प्याज़ 1 MEDIUM SIZED
SPRING ONION | हरा प्याज़ 2 NOS.

*Boiling & Frying Soya Badi (this process will also be common for all the 3 starters)*

SOY SAUCE | सोया सॉस 2 TSP
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH (ROUGHLY SLICED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 1 NO. (SLIT)
SALT | नमक A PINCH
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
FORTUNE SOYA BADI | फॉर्चून सोया बड़ी 100 GRAMS
CORN FLOUR | कॉर्न फ्लोर 2–3 TBSP

*Method:*
Add the garlic, ginger & green chilli into a chopper & chop it coarsely, do not chop it finely. 
Cut the capsicum & the onion into triangular petals or just dice them according to your convenience.
Cut & separate the white part from the greens of the spring onions, roughly chop the whites & finely chop the greens, keep them in separate bowl.
Set a stock pot with water over high heat & let it come to a boil, add ginger, green chilli, soy sauce, salt & sugar. This will add an amazing flavour to the soya badis.
Add soya chunks & let them boil for 5 minutes, meanwhile keep a large bowl with fresh water ready to rinse the soya chunks.
Once boiled, strain the soya chunks & add them into the water & rinse them by stirring.
Next, squeeze them gently (do no squeeze out all the water) & transfer them into a large bowl. 
Add corn flour a couple of tablespoons at a time & coat the chunks with it using a spatula or a spoon. 
Make sure you keep the oil ready at 170°C (moderately hot) before coating the chunks. 
Once coated fry the soya chunks in oil for a few minutes until crisp then strain them out into a sieve, fry in batches. Your crispy soya chunks are ready.

*This prep will be common for all 3 recipes.*

*Soya Schezwan Dry:*

OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
HOMEMADE SCHEZWAN SAUCE | होममेड शेज़वान सॉस 2 TBSP
RED CHILLI SAUCE | रेड चिली सॉस 1 TSP
KETCHUP | केचप 1 TSP
VINEGAR | सिरका 1/2 TSP
WHITE PEPPER POWDER | सफ़ेद मिर्च पाउडर A PINCH
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
CORN FLOUR | कॉर्न फ्लोर 1 TBSP
WATER | पानी 2 TBSP

*Soya Manchurian:*

OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
DARK SOY SAUCE | डार्क सोया सॉस 1 TBSP
LIGHT SOYA SAUCE | लाइट सोया सॉस 2 TSP
RED CHILLI SAUCE | रेड चिली सॉस 1 TBSP
KETCHUP | केचप 1 TBSP
WHITE PEPPER POWDER | सफ़ेद मिर्च पाउडर A PINCH
VINEGAR | सिरका 1/2 TSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
CORN FLOUR SLURRY | कॉर्न फ्लोर स्लरी 1 TBSP CORN FLOUR + 2 TBSP WATER
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (ROUGHLY CHOPPED)

*Crispy Honey Chilli Soya:*

OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
RED CHILLI SAUCE | रेड चिली सॉस 1.5 TBSP
KETCHUP | केचप 2 TBSP
LIGHT SOY | लाइट सोया 1 TSP
VINEGAR | सिरका 1/2 TSP
WHITE PEPPER | सफ़ेद मिर्च A PINCH
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
HONEY | शहद 2 TBSP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
CORN FLOUR SLURRY | कॉर्न फ्लोर स्लरी 1 TBSP CORN FLOUR + 2 TBSP WATER
WHITE SESAME SEEDS | सफ़ेद तिल FOR GARNISH (TOASTED)

*Method:*
The method for tossing all the 3 starters is the same, only the sauces added are different.
Set a wok over high heat, add oil & let it get hot. 
Add the chopped ginger, garlic, green chilli, stir well & cook over high flame for a few seconds.
Add all the sauces with white pepper & salt, stir well & let the sauce come to a simmer.
Add a splash of hot water to adjust the consistency of the sauce then add the corn flour slurry to thicken the sauce.
Now add the fried soya badi along with capsicum, onion & spring onion whites, stir well & coat the soya chunks with the sauce, lastly add the spring onion greens & your delicious, hatke Soya Schezwan Dry / Soya Manchurian / Crispy Soya Honey chilli is ready.

title: OIL-FREE Drumstick Soup Recipe in 20-MINUTES | स्वादिष्ट & पौष्टिक मोरिंगा का सूप | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Drumstick Soup

Prep time: 5 minutes
Cooking time: 15-20 minutes
Serves: 3-4 people

Ingredients:
DRUMSTICKS | सहजन की फलियां 4 NOS.
ONION | प्याज़ 1 NO.
GARLIC | लहसुन 8 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS.
CORIANDER STEMS | धनिये की डंठल A HANDFUL (SHOWING)
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 1 NO.
CLOVES | लौंग 2 NOS.
CINNAMON | दालचीनी 2 INCH
SALT | नमक A PINCH
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL
MINT | पुदीना 8–10 LEAVES
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
BLACK SALT | काला नमक A PINCH
ROASTED CUMIN POWDER | भुना जीरा पाउडर A PINCH
BLACK PEPPER | काली मिर्च A PINCH
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF HALF A LEMON
Method:
Lightly peel the drumsticks and cut them into pieces.
Add the drumsticks into a kadhai, along with onion, ginger, garlic, green chillies, coriander stems, bay leaf, cloves, cinnamon, a pinch of salt, and enough hot water to cover. Bring it to a boil, then cover and cook for 5–6 minutes or until the drumsticks are tender.
Once cooked, discard the whole spices. Strain the mixture, keeping the stock aside. Let the solids cool slightly, then blend them along with some fresh coriander & mint using a little of the reserved stock until smooth.
Strain the blended mixture back into the kadhai along with the remaining stock,  only the woody fibres of the drumsticks will stay back in the sieve.
Add hot water to adjust the soup’s consistency as per your preference. Bring it to a gentle simmer, then season with salt, black salt, roasted cumin powder, black pepper & lemon juice.
Serve the drumstick soup hot for a nourishing, flavourful boost.

description:

Website: https://curaahome.com/products/curaa-wooden-masala-dani 

Full written recipe - Achari Aloo
Prep time: 15-20 minutes
Cooking time: 40-45 minutes
Serves: 4-5 people

Ingredients:
Achari Masala
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
FENNEL SEEDS | सौंफ 2 TSP
MUSTARD SEEDS | राई 1/2 TSP
FENUGREEK SEEDS | मेथी के बीज A PINCH
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 3 NOS.
SALT | नमक A PINCH
DRY MANGO POWDER | आमचूर पाउडर 2 TSP
BLACK SALT | काला नमक 1/2 TSP
Gravy
MUSTARD OIL | सरसों का तेल 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1/2 TSP
MUSTARD SEEDS | राई 1/2 TSP
KALONJI | कलौंजी 1/2 TSP
ONION | प्याज़ 3 NOS. (CHOPPED)
GINGER GARLIC GREEN CHILLI PASTE | अदरक लेहसुन मिर्च की पेस्ट 2 TBSP
ACHARI MASALA | अचारी मसाला 2 TBSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TBSP
SPICY RED CHILLI POWDER | तीखी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1/2 TSP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
TOMATO PUREE | टमाटर की प्यूरी OF 2 TOMATOES
DAHI | दही 3/4 CUP (WHISKED)
SALT | नमक A PINCH
Frying Potato
POTATO | आलू 4 MEDIUM SIZED.
OIL | तेल AS REQUIRED (FOR SHALLOW FRYING)

Tossing Veggies
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (SLICED)
GARLIC | लहसुन 1 TBSP (CHOPPED)
ONION | प्याज़ 1 MEDIUM SIZED (PETALS)
TOMATO | टमाटर 1 MEDIUM SIZED (DICED)
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1 MEDIUM SIZED (DICED)
Final Ingredients
GINGER JULIENNE | अदरक के लच्छे A HANDFUL
ACHARI MASALA | अचारी मसाला 1/2 TSP
KASURI METHI | कसूरी मेथी A LARGE PINCH
FRESH CREAM | फ्रेश क्रीम  2–3 TBSP (OPTIONAL)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
SALT | नमक IF REQUIRED
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
Method:
Set a small pan over high flame & let it get got, then lower the flame & add all the whole spices & dry roast over low flame while stirring continuously until fragrant then transfer them into a bowl & let them cool down completely.
Add the toasted spices into a small mixer jar & add the powdered spices, grind it into a coarse powder, you can also use a mortar pestle, achari masala is ready.
Set a kadhai or deep pan over high flame & let it get hot, further add mustard oil & heat it until it starts smoking then lower the flame & add cumin seeds, kalonji, mustard seeds & onions, stir well & cook over high flame until the onions turn light golden brown.
Further add ginger garlic green chilli paste & cook further until the onions turn golden brown, you can add a splash of hot water if it gets too dry. Lower the flame & add all the powdered spices, achari masala, stir well & add a splash of hot water & cook over high flame until the oil gets separated. Then lower the flame & add tomato puree, curd & stir it continuously until everything gets mixed, then set the flame to high & cook for 2-3 minutes, then cover & let the gravy cook until you fry the potatoes & saute the veggies.
Set a fry-pan on the side over high flame, add oil to shallow fry the potatoes & let it get hot. I prefer to cut the potatoes into thick batons for this recipe but you can also cut them into dices or cubes.
Once the oil gets hot add the potatoes & cook over medium high flame while stirring at intervals until they are almost cooked & turn golden brown. Transfer the fried potatoes into a sieve.
After frying the potatoes also check the gravy once, stir it well & add a splash of hot water if it has become too dry, cover & let it cook over low flame.
Remove the excess oil from the pan & add the sliced green chillies & garlic, saute briefly over high flame then add all the cut veggies & toss over high flame for 2 minutes, transfer into a bowl & set the veggies aside as well.
Check the gravy, the oil should be separated, stir it well & add the potatoes & the veggies along with ginger julienne, achari masala & the remaining final ingredients, you can add some hot water so that all the ingredients mix well.
Bring the gravy to a simmer & cook for 2-3 minutes, taste & adjust salt if required & you can also add a pinch of garam masala.
Your delicious, Dhaba Style Achari Aloo is ready, serve it with rumali roti or tandooir roti.

title: Sweet Corn Dhokla Recipe | INSTANT & EASY Breakfast | इंस्टेंट स्वीट कॉर्न ढोकला | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Instant Sweet Corn Dhokla 

Prep time: 5-10 minutes
Cooking time: 30-35 minutes 
Serves: 5-6 people

Ingredients:
Dhokla
UPMA RAVA | उपमा रवा 1 CUP
SOUR CURD | खट्टा दही 1/2 CUP
WATER | पानी 3/4 CUP
SUGAR | चीनी 1/2 TSP (OPTIONAL)
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
SWEET CORN | स्वीट कॉर्न 1.5 CUPS
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 3 NOS.
SWEET CORN | स्वीट कॉर्न 1/3 CUP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
RED CHILLI FLAKES | रेड चिली फ्लेक्स 1/2 TSP
OREGANO | ऑरेगैनो 1/2 TSP
GROUNDNUT OIL | मूंगफली का तेल 1 TBSP
ENO | ईनो 1 TSP
WATER | पानी 1 TSP
BLACK PEPPER POWDER | काली मिर्च पाउडर AS REQUIRED
Tempering
GROUNDNUT OIL | मूंगफली का तेल 2–3 TBSP
MUSTARD SEEDS | राई 2 TSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 4 NOS. (SLICED)
ASAFOETIDA | हींग 1/2 TSP
CURRY LEAVES | कड़ी पत्ते 15–20 NOS.
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Method:
To make the base batter, add rawa, sour curd, water, sugar & salt in a large bowl, whisk well then cover & let it rest fro 10-15 minutes. Until then you can make the sweet corn paste & also the green chutney. You can also set the steamer after that & grease the dhokla trays with some oil.
Add the sweet corn into a mixer jar along with green chilli & ginger & grind it into a paste.
Once the batter has rest, it will thicken up as the rawa absorbs water, add the prepared sweet corn paste along with some more sweet corn, turmeric, red chilli flakes, oregano & oil, mix well.
Once the steamer is ready & you've greased the dhokla trays, add eno into the batter along with a splash of water & mix really well, then pour the batter into the trays equally, tap them gently & add a pinch of red chilli flakes, oregano & black pepper from the top.
Place the trays into the steamer & steam over high flame for 20 minutes.
Once the dhoklas are cooked, you can check by inserting a knife, it should come out clean. Remove the trays from the steamer & let them cool down slightly, do not cut the dhoklas while they are still steaming hot.
Cut the dhokla into pieces as required, then make the tempering.
Set a tadka pan over high heat, add oil & let it get hot. 
Then add the mustard seeds, green chillies & asafoetida, stir well & cook briefly, lastly add the curry leaves & pour the tempering over the dhokla equally, garnish with some fresh coriander.
Your delicious & instant Sweet Corn Dhokla is ready.


Special Green Chutney
Ingredients:

Method:
For the chutney, add all the ingredients into a mixer jar & blend it into a fine thick chutney.

title: VEG Korean Corn Dog Recipe | Famous Korean Street Food | वेज कोरियन कॉर्न डॉग | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Veg Korean Corn Dog

Prep time: 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time: 35-40 minutes
Serves: 6-8 people

Ingredients:
LUKEWARM WATER | गुनगुना पानी 1 CUP / 240 ML
SUGAR | शक्कर 1 TSP / 5 GRAMS
INSTANT DRY YEAST | इंस्टेंट ड्राई यीस्ट 1 TBSP / 8 GRAMS
REFINED FLOUR | मैदा 240 GRAMS / 1 CUP + 2/3 CUP
POTATO | आलू 3 MEDIUM SIZED. 
MOZZARELLA CHEESE BLOCK | मोज़्ज़रेल्ला ब्लॉक 200 GRAMS 
PANKO BREADCRUMBS | पैंको ब्रेड क्रंब्स AS REQUIRED (for coating)
Toppings
SALT | नमक
CASTER SUGAR | कैस्टर शुगर
MAYONNAISE | मेयोनेज़
MUSTARD SAUCE | मस्टर्ड सॉस
KETCHUP | केचप
Method:
Start by preparing the batter. In a bowl, add lukewarm water, sugar, and instant dry yeast. Stir well and let it sit for 5–10 minutes or until the yeast becomes foamy, this is a good way to check if the yeast that you are using is still active.
Once the yeast is activated, take a large mixing bowl, pour in the yeast water and add refined flour. Mix everything well until you get a smooth, sticky batter. Cover it and keep it in a warm place to let it rise until it doubles in volume.
While the batter is resting, peel and cut the potatoes into small dices, blanch them in boiling water for exactly 3 minutes, then drain and transfer onto a tissue-lined tray. Set them aside to cool completely. 
Next, cut the mozzarella cheese block into long rectangular sticks or use cubes if that's more convenient, the shape won’t matter much since they’ll be fully coated. Skewer the cheese sticks on a bamboo skewer carefully and keep them ready.
After the batter has risen, give it a quick mix. You’ll notice it’s stretchy and stringy, that’s due to the gluten formation. The batter is now ready to use.
Before frying, set up your coating station. You’ll need the diced potatoes, panko breadcrumbs, prepared batter, and skewered cheese sticks. Also, heat oil in a kadhai or deep pan to 175°C.
Now, take a cheese skewer and dip it fully into the batter. Lift, pull gently, and rotate to coat evenly. Immediately roll the coated stick in diced potatoes, press lightly so the pieces stick well. Finally, coat the entire thing in panko breadcrumbs.
Carefully drop the prepared corn dog into the hot oil and fry until it turns golden brown and crispy. Avoid stirring to prevent the coating from loosening or the cheese from oozing out.
Once fried, take it out and let it drain over a wire rack or a sieve.
To finish, sprinkle a pinch of salt and caster sugar on top. Drizzle mayonnaise, mustard sauce, and ketchup as per your liking. You can also try other topping ideas like sweet chilli sauce, spicy mayo, or even a sprinkle of peri peri seasoning.
Serve the Veg Korean Corn Dogs hot and crispy.
