title: Perfect Cheesy Mushroom Tikka Recipe WITHOUT OVEN & TANDOOR | तंदूरी मुह्सरूम टिक्का | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Buy now:

Amazon - https://www.amazon.in/Capacity-Countertop-Non-Slip-Marinating-Kneading/dp/B0DLNP644B

Website - https://yflhome.com/products/black-bowl

Full written recipe - Stuffed Mushroom Tikka

Prep time: 15-20 minutes (excluding making of hung curd)
Cooking time: 15-20 minutes
Serves: 4-5 people

Ingredients:
Marinade
HUNG CURD | टंगा हुआ दही 4 TBSP
MUSTARD OIL | सरसों का तेल 1 TBSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/2 TSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1/2 TSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
BLACK SALT | काला नमक 1/4 TSP
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर 1/4 TSP 
GINGER GARLIC GREEN CHILLI PASTE | अदरक लहसुन हरी मिर्च की पेस्ट 1 TBSP
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF HALF A LEMON
LIVE CHARCOAL | जलता हुआ कोयला
MUSTARD OIL | सरसों का तेल
MUSHROOM | मशरुम 350 GRAMS
Stuffing
PANEER | पनीर 50 GRAMS (GRATED)
PROCESSED CHEESE | प्रोसेस्ड चीज़ 50 GRAMS (GRATED)
SALT | नमक A PINCH 
GINGER | अदरक 1 TSP (CHOPPED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (CHOPPED)
MINT | पुदीना A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
CARDAMON POWDER | इलाइची पाउडर A PINCH 
CHAAT MASALA | चाट मसाला A PINCH 
POWDERED SUGAR | पीसी हुई शक्कर 1 TSP
AJWAIN | अजवाइन A PINCH
Veggies for skewering 
ONION | प्याज़ AS REQUIRED (DICED)
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च AS REQUIRED (DICED)
Cooking on pan
GHEE | घी 1 TSP
Cooking over direct flame
BUTTER | मक्खन (MELTED)
Cooking in air-fryer
BUTTER | मक्खन (MELTED)
Method:
In a large bowl add hung curd along with all the remaining ingredients of the marinade & whisk it into a smooth marinade.
To give the marinade a smoky flavour, place a small bowl with live charcoal inside it, add a spoonful of mustard oil, cover & let the marinade smoke for 4-5 minutes, then uncover & discard the charcoal carefully. Mix well & your tandoori marinade is ready.
Prep the mushrooms by plucking the stem out & scrape the insides to form a cup. Try using medium sized mushrooms for this recipe.
For the stuffing, grate & add the paneer & the cheese in a bowl & add all the remaining ingredients & mix well, taste & adjust seasoning if required. 
Stuff the mushrooms with the stuffing using a spoon, make sure you press the stuffing inside firmly to lock it inside, otherwise the stuffing might fall out while coating with the marinade.
I like to use bamboo skewers to make any kind of tikkas, just soak them in water for 30 minutes so that they don't burn while cooking. 
Skewer a dice of onion & capsicum onto the skewer, then coat the mushroom & skewer it, you can skewer about 4-5 mushrooms on one skewer, in the end you can again add a dice of capsicum & onion, ready as many skewers as required. Do not coat the mushroom with the marinade & let it rest, the mushroom will start oozing out water which will make the marinade drip. 
To cook them on a pan, heat the pan over high flame & then add very little ghee or oil. Once the ghee heats up, place the skewers 3-4 at a time if you have a large enough pan, cook the tikkas over medium high flame, until golden brown from one side then turn & cook them similarly on the other side, let them get a little charred from each side. Your delicious stuffed mushrooms tikkas are ready using a pan.
The second method is cooking the tikka over direct flame, just hold the skewer over direct flame & rotate it at regular intervals until the marinade gets cooked, it will turn brown from some spots & get charred beautifully over direct flame, you can apply some melted butter & continue cooking it over flame. This method works best if you want to replicate the perfect texture similar to a tandoor, however it is a bit time consuming.
To cook it in an air-fryer or anything oven, preheat the airfyer or oven at 200°C, place the skewers onto the tray & cook them for 10-12 minutes. After 5-6 minutes, apply some butter on the tikkas & continue to cook them.
These are the 3 ways in which you can cook the Stuffed Mushroom Tikkas & all of them taste absolutely delicious, serve it with some green chutney & garnish with some lemon juice & chaat masala.

title: BHAJJI PAV Recipe | Mumbai's Famous Batata Bhajji | मुंबई का भजिया पाव | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Mumbai’s Famous Bhajji Pav
Prep time: 5-10 minutes 
Cooking time: 20-25 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Ingredients:
Besan Batter
GRAM FLOUR | बेसन 1.5 CUPS 
BAKING SODA | बेकिंग सोडा A PINCH 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
AJWAIN | अजवाइन A PINCH (CRUSHED)
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED 
Thecha
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 10-12 NOS. 
GARLIC | लहसुन 15-20 CLOVES
FRESH CORIANDER STEMS | हरे धनिये के डंठल A HANDFUL 
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A PINCH 
OIL | तेल 1 TSP
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL 
SALT | नमक A LARGE PINCH
Quick Imli Chutney
WATER | पानी 1.5 CUPS (BOILING)
TAMARIND | इमली A LEMON SIZED 
SUGAR | शक्कर 1/2 CUP
SALT | नमक A PINCH 
Dry Garlic Chutney
GARLIC | लहसुन 8-10 CLOVES (WITH SKIN)
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1.5-2 TBSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
Fried Green Chilli
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च AS REQUIRED 
SALT | नमक A PINCH 
Frying Bhajiya
WATER | पानी A SPLASH
POTARO | आलू 5 MEDIUM SIZED or AS REQUIRED
Method:
Sieve & add the gram flour into a large bowl along with salt, carom seeds & baking soda, mix all the dry ingredients.
Further add water & start whisking the batter, don’t add too much water at once, only add a little amount initially & whisk until all the lumps are gone.
Further add more water & adjust the consistency, the batter should be slightly thin but not completely runny, once the batter is ready cover & set it aside & let it rest until you make the other components.
For the thecha, in a pan, dry roast the garlic, green chilli & coriander stems over high flame until they get slightly charred then add the cumin seeds & oil, stir well & roast briefly. 
Transfer the mixture into a bowl & let it cool down completely, then add it into a a coarse paste using a mortar pestle along with some fresh coriander & salt, your thecha is ready.
To make the instant sweet tamarind chutney, set a stock pot with boiling water over high flame & then add the tamarind, let it boil for 5-6 minutes or until it softens completely, then switch off the flame & let it cool down completely.
Transfer it to a mixer jar & add sugar with salt & blend it into a fine chutney, then strain & transfer it into a bowl, your instant sweet tamarind chutney is ready.
To make the dry garlic chutney you need to make “chura” first, chura is basically the extra crispy bits of the besan batter that are fried separately.
Set oil in a kadhai on high heat & let it get hot, then take the besan batter & give a mix, dip your fingers in the batter & randomly drizzle & drop in hot oil, deep fry on medium high heat until its crisp & golden brown in colour, make sure that the chura is not too thick. Sieve it & keep aside to cool down. You need about 2 cups of the chura for the chutney.
You also need fried garlic, first pick the garlic cloves with toothpick, place them in a spider & deep fry briefly for 30-60 seconds, keep dipping & removing the cloves, do not fry them continuously as they then to splutter, once fried remove & keep aside.
Add the chura in a food processor, along with fried garlic, salt & red chilli powder, use pulse mode & grind into a coarse dry chutney. Your dry red garlic chutney is ready; you can also store in an airtight container & store in the fridge for up to a week.
For the fried green chillies, take spicy green chillies as required & put a small cut into the chillies using a knife so that they don’t splutter a lot in oil, then similar to garlic, add the chillies into a spider & fry them by dipping into the hot oil, then transfer them into a bowl & add salt, mix well.
For the perfect bhajiya. Check the batter once, the batter tends to thicken slightly after resting, so add water if required to adjust the consistency.
Take washed potatoes & slice them thinly using a mandolin. Dip the slices into the prepared besan batter, ensuring each slice has a thin, even coating. Carefully drop the coated slices into hot oil & fry until golden & crisp. Transfer them to a sieve to drain excess oil. Fry in batches & only as needed to retain freshness & crunch.
Cut the pav & apply a layer of spicy thecha on one side. Add sweet tamarind chutney on the other side, followed by a sprinkle of dry red garlic chutney. Stack the hot, crispy bhajiyas inside the pav, garnish with a little more dry garlic chutney on top, & finish with a fried green chilli on the side or tucked in.

title: Paneer Chilli Milli Recipe | Restaurant Style Spicy Mix Veg | होटल जैसा वेज चिली मिली | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Shop now:

Website - https://curaahome.com/products/beige-curaa-kettle

Amazon - https://www.amazon.in/Electric-Kettle1-8-Protection-Detachable-Cool-Touch/dp/B0DN6KNBS2

Full written recipe - Paneer Chilli Milli

Prep time: 15-20 minutes
Cooking time: 35-40 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Ingredients:
For Tomato Puree
TOMATO | टमाटर 4 NOS. (ROUGHLY CUT)
CASHEW | काजू 15 NOS. (BOILED)
GARLIC | लहसुन 10 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 1 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 1 NO.
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TSP
CUMIN POWDER | पाउडर 1/2 TSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
Frying paneer
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
PANEER | पनीर 250–300 GRAMS
For Gravy 
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1/2 TSP
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 2 NOS.
CINNAMON | दालचीनी 2 INCH
GREEN CARDAMOM | हरी इलायची 3 NOS.
ONION | प्याज़ 3 MEDIUM SIZED (CHOPPED)
GARLIC | लहसुन 2 TBSP (CHOPPED)
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
SUGAR | शक्कर A LARGE PINCH
SALT | नमक IF REQUIRED
BUTTER | मक्खन 1 TBSP
OIL | तेल 1 TSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A PINCH
Tossing Veggies
FRENCH BEANS | फ्रेंच बीन्स 10–12 NOS. (SLICED)
CABBAGE | पत्ता गोभी 1/2 SMALL SIZED
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1/2 SMALL SIZED (JULIENNE)
CORIANDER STEMS | धनिये की डंठल 1 TBSP (CHOPPED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 7–8 (SLICED)
GINGER JULIENNE | अदरक के लच्छेA SMALL HANDFUL
SALT | नमक A PINCH
Final Ingredients 
FRESH CREAM | फ्रेश  क्रीम 2–3 TBSP (OPTIONAL)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी पाउडर A PINCH
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
Method:
Add all the ingredients of the tomato puree in a mixer jar & blend it into a fine puree.
Cut the paneer into pieces as per your preference & shallow fry them in a pan until they turn light golden brown, transfer them into a plate & set them aside until you prepare the gravy.
Set a kadhai over high heat, let it get hot & then add the oil, let the oil heat up as well.
Next, add the cumin seeds along with the remaining whole spices, stir & cook for a few seconds then add the chopped onions, cook the onions over medium high flame until they turn golden brown. 
Then add the chopped garlic, stir & cool the chopped garlic for 2-3 minutes.
Next, add the prepared tomato puree with salt, stir well & cook over high flame until the oil gets separated.
Once the gravy is cooked & the oil gets separated, add hot water to adjust the consistency of the gravy, keep it semi-thick, then taste & add sugar, adjust salt if required, the gravy is ready, switch off the flame while you toss the veggies.
Set a pan over high heat, add butter & oil, let it get hot.
Add the cumin seeds, let them crackle & then add the French beans, stit & cook over high flame for 2-3 minutes.
Then add all the remaining ingredients of tossing veggies & cook over high flame for 2-3 minutes & add them into the gravy along with fried paneer & final ingredients, you can add a splash of hot water so that all the things can mix easily.
Switch off the flame for that the gravy gets hot again & your delicious Paneer Chilli Milli is ready, serve it with some butter naan or any other Indian bread of your choice.

title: Healthy Sprouted Moong Appe | Instant Breakfast Recipe | स्प्राउटेड मूंग दाल के अप्पे | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Healthy Sprouts Dosa: https://youtu.be/hV-WukaMvEQ?si=E-MN8J4pc04QWU3-
Coconut Chutney: https://youtu.be/3DFWkNqSn1M?t=216&si=SgTnenGgEuMUkp0E
Onion Tomato Chutney: https://youtu.be/PFG1aeYgi7c?t=643&si=sPsUxQEidygi5BPi
Instant Rava Appe: https://youtu.be/pEmnQQnKH8U?si=9iPgLzx7yr0KKKew

Full written recipe - Healthy Green Moong Sprouts Appe
Prep time: 5-10 minutes (using ready moong sprouts)
Cooking time: 15-20 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Ingredients:
Veggies Prep
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. 
CURRY LEAVES | कड़ी पत्ता 10-12 NOS.
CARROT | गाजर 1 SMALL SIZED. 
FRENCH BEANS | फ्रेंच बींस 8-10 NOS.
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1 SMALL SIZED.
ONION | प्याज़ 1 SMALL SIZED.
SWEET CORN | स्वीट कॉर्न 1/4 CUP
Tempering
GHEE | घी 2 TSP
CHANA DAL | चना दाल 1/2 TSP
URAD DAL | उरद दाल 1/2 TSP
ASAFOETIDA | हींग 1/2 TSP
MUSTARD SEEDS | राई 1/2 TSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1/2 TSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP 
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1/2 TSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/4 TSP
Moong Sprouts Batter
GREEN MOONG SPROUTS | हरी मूंग के अंकुर 2 CUP / 300 GRAMS
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL 
MINT LEAVES | पुदीना A SMALL HANDFUL 
GINGER | अदरक 1 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 1 NO.
WATER | पानी A SPLASH
BLACK PEPPER POWDER | काली मिर्च का पाउडर 1/4 TSP 
SALT | नमक A PINCH 
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1/2 TSP 
For Cooking
WATER | पानी A SPLASH (to adjust the consistency of the batter if required)
GHEE | घी AS REQUIRED 
Method:
In a chopper add ginger, green chilli, curry leaves along with carrot, french beans, capsicum, onion & sweet corn, chop all the ingredients, you can also use a knife but a chopper makes things quicker.
To give a quick tempering to the veggies, set a pan over high heat, add ghee & let it get hot.
Further add chana & urad dal, stir & cook them for a few seconds until they start to change their colour.
Add asafoetida, mustard & cumin seeds followed by the chopped veggies mixture & salt, stir well & cook over high flame for 2-3 minutes then lower the flame & add turmeric powder, kashmiri red chilli powder, garam masala, stir well & cook briefly, then transfer the mixture into a bowl & let it cool down completely.
While the veggies are cooling down, make the sprouts batter by adding the green moong sprouts into a mixer jar along with all the remaining ingredients of the batter & grind it into a thick batter, do not add a lot of water in the beginning.
Transfer the batter into a large bowl & add the cooled veggie mixture, stir well & check the consistency of the batter, it should be similar to an idli batter, not too runny & not too thick either so add water if required.
Set the appe pan over high heat & let it get moderately hot, then grease it with very little ghee.
Pour spoonful of the batter into each mould, cover & cook over medium low flame for 5-6 minutes.
Then take the lid off & flip the appe using a spoon or a toothpick, they should turn golden brown from one side, now you can optionally add a few drops of ghee then cover & cook again for 2-3 minutes or until the other side turns golden brown as well, you can add more ghee if required.
Once the appe turn golden brown from both the sides, scoop them out & transfer onto a plate. 
Your delicious, crisp from the outside & soft from the inside instant Green Moong Sprouts appe are ready, you can serve them with coconut chutney & onion tomato chutney.

title: Healthy Kaala Chana Soup & Chaat | ZERO-OIL Recipe | काले चने का सूप और चाट | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Healthy No Oil Kala Chana Soup & Chaat

Prep time: 5 minutes (excluding soaking time) & 10-15 minutes for the chaat 
Cooking time: 15-20 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Ingredients: For Soup
BLACK CHICKPEAS | काले चने 1 CUPS (SOAKED OVERNIGHT)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 3 NOS.
GINGER | अदरक 1 INCH
GARLIC | लहसुन 12-15 CLOVES
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED (for paste)
TOMATO | टमाटर 1 NO. 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/2 TSP 
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1/2 TSP
BLACK PEPPER POWDER | काली मिर्च पाउडर 1/4 TSP
CUMIN POWDER | जीरा पाउडर 1/2 TSP
BLACK SALT | काला नमक 1 TSP
DRY MANGO POWDER  | आमचूर पाउडर 1 TSP
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED  
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF A LEMON
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
MINT LEAVES | पुदीना A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Method:
Wash & soak the chickpeas overnight or you also get soaked chickpeas in the market, you need 2 cups of soaked chickpeas for this recipe.
Add the ginger, garlic & green chilli in a small mixer jar along with some water & blend it into a fine paste.
Now in a pressure add the soaked chickpeas after discarding the water, roughly cut the tomato into quarters & then add salt along with all the powdered spices followed by water, add about 3 litres of water & stir well.
Next, put the lid on & pressure cook the chickpeas over medium high flame for 4-5 whistles then switch off the flame & let it depressurize naturally.
Then check the whistle for any excess pressure & open the lid stir well. Check if the chickpeas are cooked by pressing one between your fingers.
At this stage, stir well, switch on the flame to high and bring the soup to a simmer. Taste & adjust seasoning if required. Lastly add some chopped fresh coriander & mint. 
Your delicious, no oil healthy chana soup is ready, serve it hot, you can add boiled chickepeas as per your preference and optionally you can add a small cube of butter and some chaat masala. 


Chaat assembly:
BOILED CHICKPEAS | उबले हुए काले चने AS REQUIRED 
BOILED POTATO | उबले हुए आलू (DICED)
TOMATO | टमाटर (CHOPPED)
ONION | प्याज़ (CHOPPED)
APPLE | सेब (DICED)
PINEAPPLE | पाइनएप्पल (DICED)
GRAPES | ग्रेप्स (DICED)
POMEGRANATE | अनार 
GINGER (CHOPPED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च (CHOPPED)
CHAAT MASALA | चाट मसाला 
BLACK SALT | काला नमक 
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस 
SWEET TAMARIND CHUTNEY | गुड़ और इमली की चटनी 
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया
MINT | पुदीना 

Method:
To make the chat, simply strain the boiled chickpeas as required & add all the ingredients of the assembly as per your taste, you can skip the fruits that you don't like and add your preferred ones.
Just stir well & then serve, your delicious, fresh & flavour chaat is ready.

title: Corn Capsicum Masala | Restaurant Style Recipe | स्वादिष्ट कॉर्न कैप्सिकम मसाला | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Corn Capsicum Masala 

Prep time: 5-10 minutes
Cooking time: 25-30 minutes
Serves: 4-5 people

Ingredients:
ONION | पयाज़ 3 NOS. 
TOMATO | टमाटर 2 NOS.
GARLIC | लहसुन 10-12 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS.
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 2 MEDIUM SIZED. (MEDIUM DICES)
SWEET CORN | स्वीट कॉर्न 2 CUPS
GHEE | घी 2 TBSP
OIL | तेल 1 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
GREEN CARDAMOM | हरी इलाइची 2 NOS.
CINNAMON | दालचीनी 1 INCH
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 2 NOS.
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
SPICY RED CHILLI POWDER | तीखी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TBSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर ½ TSP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED
CURD | दही 1/2 CUP (WHISKED)
CASHEW PASTE | काजू की पेस्ट OF 10-12 NOS. 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर A PINCH
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A LARGE PINCH
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)

Method:
Chop the onions & tomato separately using a string chopper or using a knife according to your convenience. Finely chop the ginger, garlic & green chilli as well.
Set a kadhai over high flame, add ghee & oil, allow it to heat up as well.
Then, add all the whole spices & let them crackle for a few seconds & then add the chopped onions, stir well & cook over high flame until the onions turn golden brown. 
Once the onions turn light golden brown, add the chopped ginger garlic & green chilli, stir & continue to cook until the onions turn completely golden brown.
Then lower the flame & add all the powdered spices along with a splash of hot water, stir well & cook over high flame for 2-3 minutes.
Next, add the chopped tomatoes along with whisked curd, cashew paste & salt, stir well & cook over high flame until the gravy turns crumbly & all the ghee gets separated.
Once the gravy is cooked, add hot water to adjust the consistency of the gravy, it should be semi-thick and not too thin, then add the sweet corn, stir well, cover & cook over low flame for 4-5 minutes.
Then take the lid off & add the diced capsicum, stir well & cook for 2-3 minutes.
Taste & adjust salt if required & lastly add kasuri methi powder, garam masala & fresh coriander. 
Your delicious, quick & easy Corn Capsicum Masala is ready, serve hot with some tandoori rotis or other Indian bread of your choice.

title: Rajma Masala Recipe | Dhaba Style Easy Rajma | ढाबे जैसा मसालेदार राजमा मसाला | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Rajma Masala

Prep time: 5-10 minutes (overnight soaking of rajma)
Cooking time: 30-35 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Ingredients:
Boiled Rajma
CHITRA RAJMA | चित्रा राजमा 250 GRAMS (SOAKED OVERNIGHT)
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 1 NO. 
CINNAMON | दालचीनी 2 INCH
BLACK CARDAMOM | बड़ी इलाइची 1 NO.
CLOVES | लौंग 3 NOS.
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED (1 INCH ABOVE THE RAJMA)
SALT | नमक A LARGE PINCH 
Onion Paste 
ONION | प्याज 3 MEDIUM SIZED. (ROUGHLY CUT)
Tomato Puree
TOMATO | टमाटर 3 MEDIUM SIZED. (ROUGHLY CUT)
GARLIC | लहसुन 15 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी इलाइची 2 NOS.
Tempering and Final Cooking 
GHEE | घी 2 TBSP
OIL | तेल 1 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP 
ASAFOETIDA | हींग 1/4 TSP
ONION PASTE | प्याज़ कि पेस्ट 
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH 
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP 
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 2 TBSP
CUMIN POWDER | जीरा पाउडर 1 TSP
DRY MANGO POWDER | अमचूर पाउडर 1 TSP
BLACK SALT | काला नमक A LARGE PINCH
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
TOMATO PUREE | टमाटर कि प्युरी 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
KASURI METHI | कसूरी मेथी 1 TBSP
GHEE | घी 1-2 TBSP (OPTIONAL)
YELLOW CHILLI POWDER | पीली मिर्च का पाउडर 1 TSP
GINGER JULIENNE | अदरक के लच्छे A HANDFUL 
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (SLICED)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
Method:
Soak the rajma in water for 6-8 hours or overnight, then discard the water & wash them thoroughly to get rid of any smell. 
Add the soaked rajma into a pressure cooker along with the whole spices, salt, water & pressure cook over high flame for one whistle then over medium flame for 2-3 more whistles.
Switch off the flame & let the cooker depressurize naturally, then open the lid & check if the rajma is cooked, if not then pressure cook them for 1 more whistle.
Discard the whole spices & keep the cooked rajma aside.
Add the onions into a mixer jar & grind them into a paste.
Similarly, add all the ingredients of the tomato puree & blend them into a fine puree. 
Set a kadhai over high heat, add ghee & oil, let it get hot. 
Further add cumin seeds & onion paste, stir well & cook over high flame until it turns golden brown, you can add splashes of hot water if the paste starts sticking to kadhai. 
Lower the flame & add all the powdered spices with a splash of water, stir well & cook the spices over high flame for a minute or two. 
Next,  add the tomato puree with salt & cook until the ghee separates & the masala becomes crumbly, this will take 10-12 minutes, if it becomes dry then add hot water & cook it further. 
Then add the cooked rajma, stir well & simmer it for 6-8 minutes or until it becomes semi-thick.
Mash a few rajma to thicken up the gravy faster.
Once the gravy becomes semi-thick, dry roast kasuri methi over medium flame in a separate pan then transfer it into a small bowl, crush it between your hands & add it to the gravy.
Then in the same pan heat some ghee & add it to the rajma, along with yellow chilli powder, ginger, green chilli, garam masala & fresh coriander, stir well. 
Your delicious, dhaba style rajma masala is ready, serve it with some hot tandoori rotis or bread kulcha with jeera rice.

description:
Full written recipe - Paneer Changezi

Prep time: 10-15 minutes
Cooking time: 1 hour
Serves: 5-6 people


Blanching Tomatoes
TOMATO | टमाटर 6 NOS. 
ICE COLD WATER | बर्फ वाला पानी
Gravy Base
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP 
ONION | प्याज़ 1 LARGE SIZED. (CHOPPED)
GINGER GARLIC PASTE | अदरक लहसुन की पेस्ट 2 TBSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2-3 NOS. (CRUSHED)
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 TBSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TBSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/2 TSP
CUMIN POWDER | जीरा पाउडर 1 TSP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
SALT | नमक TO TASTE 
Grilled/Sauteed Paneer
PANEER | पनीर 350 GRAMS
Marinade
THICK CURD | गाढ़ा दही 2 TBSP
GINGER GARLIC PASTE | अदरक लहसुन की पेस्ट 1 TBSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मीर्च 2-3 NOS. (CHOPPED)
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 TSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर A PINCH
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
CUMIN POWDER | जीरा पाउडर 1 TSP
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रास 1 TSP 
OIL | तेल 2 TSP
CORN FLOUR | कॉर्न फ्लौर 1-2 TSP (OR BESAN)
OIL | तेल 1 TSP
Final Cooking
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
CURD | दही 1/3 CUP (WHISKED)
FRESH CREAM | फ्रेश क्रीम 2 TBSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A LARGE PINCH
YELLOW CHILLI POWDER | पीली मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर A PINCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2-3 NOS. (SLICED
CHAAT MASALA | चाट मसाला A PINCH
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Garnish
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया
GINGER JULIENNE | अदरक के लच्छे
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 
Method:
To make the base gravy you’ll first need to blanch the tomatoes, make cross cuts over the tomatoes & add them to the boiling water & boil them for 10 minutes.
After boiling them for 10 minutes strain them using a spider & transfer them into a bowl.
Once the tomatoes cool down, peel & add them into a mixer grinder jar & grind them into a coarse puree.
Further heat a handi or a large kadhai, then add oil & let it heat nicely as well, once the oil gets hot add the chopped onions & cook them over medium high flame until they turn golden brown while stirring them at regular intervals.
Once the onions turn light golden brown, add the ginger garlic paste, stir & continue to cook until the onions turn golden brown.
Once the onions turn golden brown, lower the flame & add all the powdered spices & add hot water immediately, stir well & cook the spices for 3-4 minutes or until the oil separates.
Once the oil separates, add the tomato puree & salt, stir well then cover & cook the gravy for 15-20 minutes over medium flame & your base gravy for chicken changezi will be ready.
Cut the paneer into semi-thick rectangles.
Prepare the marinade by mixing all the ingredients in a large bowl, then place the paneer pieces & coat them with the marinade gently.
Set a nonstick or a well seasoned pan over high flame, then add the oil & grill the paneer pieces until light golden brown from both sides, transfer into a bowl & set them aside.
You make the final gravy, heat a tawa or any flat surfaced vessel over high flame, add oil & let it get hot. 
Further add the base gravy along with whisked curd, fresh cream, garam masala, yellow chilli powder & salt, stir well & cook over high flame for 10-12 minutes while stirring at regular intervals.
After cooking it for 10-12 minutes the gravy will become coarse & crumbly, this is the perfect texture for changezi, add hot water to adjust the consistency & cook for 5-6 minutes the gravy should be semi-thick to almost thick. Taste & adjust salt if required at this stage.
Then add the paneer along with green chillies, chaat masala, kasuri & mix well & cook for 2-3 minutes, coat the paneer with the gravy.
Lastly add fresh coriander & your delicious Delhi Style Paneer Changezi is ready, serve hot with tandoori rotis.

Method:Add all the ingredients of the base into a pan, switch on the flame to high & let all the ingredients get hot.
Cook over high flame until the tomatoes turn soft then add hot water, cover & cook over medium low flame until the tomatoes turn completely mushy, you can remove the lid & stir at intervals.
Once the tomatoes turn completely mushy, switch off the flame & let the mixture cool down completely. Transfer the cooled mixture into a mixer jar, add water & blend it into a fine puree.
Strain & add the puree into a kadhai or a saucepan, add hot water to adjus the consistency, keep the soup slightly thin at this stage, alonf with black pepper, oregano, black salt, ketchup & sugar, sti well, bring the soup to a boil & let it simmer for a few minutes.
Once the soup has simmered for a couple of minutes then add the macaroni along with all the veggies, stir well & cook the veggies & pasta for 8-10 minutes or until the pasta is cooked.
Lastly taste & adjust seasoning & the consistency if required according to your preference & lastly add some lemon juice & fresh coriander.
Your quick, healthy & tasty Desi Macaroni Soup is ready.

description:
Full written recipe - Vegetable Sweet Corn Soup

Method:
Boil the sweet corn for 4-5 minutes or until they start floating on the surface then strain them from the water & divide it into 2 equal halves. Let the sweet corn cool down completely.
Add one portion into a mixer jar, as water & blend it into a fine puree.
To make the soup, set a kadhai over high heat, add the sweet corn puree along with hot water, stir & bring the soup to a boil.
Once the soup comes to a boil, set the flame to medium high & let it simmer for 7-8 minutes & discard the scum that floats on the surface.
Then add all the salt, sugar, white pepper, vinegar, light soy sauce along with all the veggies & cook the soup for 4-5 minutes. 
Then mix corn flour & water in a boil & add it into the soup to thicken it, this is completely optional. 
Taste & adjust seasoning if required & lastly add diced paneer & spring onion greens.
Your delicious, super comforting & quick Veg Sweet Corn Soup is ready.

title: EASIEST Tomato Bharta | QUICK HOMESTYLE Bharta | झटपट बनने वाला टमाटर का भरता | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Tomato Bharta 

Prep time: 5-10 minutes
Cooking time: 15-20 minutes
Serves: 3-4 people

Ingredients:
Roasting 
TOMATO | टमाटर 6 NOS.
MUSTARD OIL | सरसों का तेल AS REQUIRED 
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 4-5 NOS.
GARLIC | लहसुन 20-25 GLOVES 
CORIANDER STEM | धनिए के डंठल A HANDFUL 
WATER | पानी VERY LITTLE (for grinding)
Tempering 
MUSTARD OIL | सरसों का तेल 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
MUSTARD SEEDS | राई 1 TSP
CURRY LEAVES | कड़ी पत्ता 10 NOS.
ONION | प्याज़ 2 LARGE (CHOPPED)
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
BLACK SALT | काला नमक A PINCH
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
SALT | नमक IF REQUIRED
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Method:
Set a papad jali over medium high flame, place the tomatoes & brush some mustard oil on them, roast the tomatoes over direct flame until they get fully charred & soft.
Then place them in a bowl, cover & let them rest for a couple of minutes.
Meanwhile, set a pan over high flame & let it get hot, then add the green chillies, garlic & coriander stems, stir & dry roast all the ingredients for 4-5 minutes until they get charred slightly, then transfer them into a bowl & let them cool down. Then cut the tops of the green chii& add all the ingredients into a small mixer jar, add very little water & grind it into a thick, coarse paste.
Then peel the tomatoes & chop them up roughly, do not mash them completely, just mince them using a knife, keep them coarse.
For the tempering, set a kadhai over high flame & add mustard oil, heat the mustard oil until it starts smoking, then switch off or lower the flame & let it cool down slightly.
Then add cumin seeds, mustard seeds, curry leaves, prepared paste & onions, stir well & cool over high flame until the onions turn soft.
Then lower the flame & add turmeric powder & kashmiri red chilli powder, stir immediately & then add the tomatoes along with salt, black salt, sugar, stir well & cook for 2-3 minutes.
Lastly taste & adjust salt if required & add garam masala & fresh coriander.

title: Broccoli Malai Tikka Recipe | TANDOOR TEXTURE AT HOME | ब्रोक्कोली मलाई टिक्का | Sanjyot Keer
description:
BB : https://yflhome.com/products/black-bowl

Measuring spoon : https://amzn.in/d/d7xsZv3 


Full written recipe - Broccoli Malai Tikka

Prep time: 10-15 minutes (excluding hung curd)
Cooking time: 25-30 minutes
Serves: 6-8 people

Ingredients 
Blanching 
BROCCOLI | ब्रोकोली 300 GRAMS (FLORETS)
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED (for blanching)
ICE COLD WATER | ठंडा पानी 
SALT | नमक A LARGE PINCH 
Malai Marinade 
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
CASHEW | काजू 10-12 NOS.
MELON SEEDS | खरबूजे के बीज 1 TBSP
PROCESSED CHEESE | प्रोसेस्ड चीज़ 2 CUBES / 50 GRAMS
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS.
GARLIC | लहसुन 10-12 CLOVES
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
FRESH CREAM | फ्रेश क्रीम 2 TBSP
WATER | पानी 1 TBSP
HUNG CURD | टंगा हुआ दही 200-250 GRAMS 
CORN FLOUR | कॉर्न फ्लोर 2 TBSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
BLACK PEPPER POWDER | काली मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP (FRESHLY CRUSHED)
POWDERED SUGAR | पीसी हुई शक्कर 1 TBSP
CARDAMOM POWDER | इलायची पाउडर 1/4 TSP
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
BLACK SALT | काला नमक A PINCH
CHAAT MASALA | चाट मसाला A PINCH
BUTTER | मक्खन 1 TBSP (SOFT)
For Smoky Flavour 
LIVE CHARCOAL | जलता हुआ कोयला 
GHEE | घी 
Cooking
GHEE | घी 1 TSP
MELTED BUTTER | पिघला हुआ मक्खन AS REQUIRED

Method:
Cut the broccoli head into large size florets, you'll need about 300 grams of broccoli florets.
Submerge the florets into boiling water, add a large pinch of salt, stir & let them cool for 4-5 minutes or until fork tender. Do not boil then until they turn extremely soft, the broccoli should remain firm.
Transfer the broccoli into ice cold water & let them cool down for a few minutes, then strain them into a sieve. Make sure that the broccoli is completely dry, you can also pay dry them using a clean kitchen napkin.
To make the marinade boil the cashews & meon seeds for a few minutes, then strain & transfer them into a bowl & allow them to cool down completely. 
Transfer the cashews & melon seeds into a mixer jar along with, cheese, green chilli, garlic, ginger, fresh cream & very little & grind it into a smooth, fine paste. 
Add the hung curd into a large bowl along with the prepared paste & add corn flour along with the powdered spices & butter, whisk well to make a smooth lump free marinade. 
To give the marinade a smoky flavour, place a small bowl with live charcoal inside it, add a spoonful of ghee, cover & let the marinade smoke for 4-5 minutes, then uncover & discard the charcoal carefully. Mix well & the malai tikka marinade is ready. 
To skewer the broccoli, I like to use bamboo skewers that are easily available, just soak them in water for 30 minutes so that they don't burn & blacken while cooking.
Coat the blanched broccoli florets with the marinade & skewer them, about 3-4 florets on one skewer should be enough. Coat & skewer all the broccoli florets. 
To cook them on a grill pan, heat the pan over high flame & then add very little ghee. Once the ghee heats up, place the skewers 3-4 at a time if you have a large enough pan, cook the tikkas over medium high and until golden brown from one side then turn & cook them similarly on the other side. 
Once cooked, you can apply some melted butter & hold the skewers over direct flame to replicate that charred effect of tandoor.
The second method is cooking the tikka over direct flame, just hold the skewer over direct flame & rotate it at regular intervals until the marinade get cooked, it will turn brown from some spots & get charred beautifully over direct flame, you can apply some melted butter & continue cooking it over flame. This method works best if you want to replicate the perfect texture similar to a tandoor, however it is a bit time consuming.
To cook it in an air-fryer or anything oven, preheat the airfyer or oven at 200°C, place the skewers onto the tray & cook them for 10-12 minutes. After 5-6 minutes, apply some butter on the tikkas & continue to cook them.
Your delicious Broccoli Malai Tikka is ready. I usually prefer to cook them over direct flame as that gives the perfect Tandoor like texture at home.

title: Famous CHICKEN GHEE ROAST Recipe of Kundapur | Tasty, Spicy, Easy चिकन घी रोस्ट | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Buy now - BLP ✨

Amazon - https://amzn.in/d/hKn235A
Website - https://yflhome.com/products/blendlabpro2
Zepto - https://www.zeptonow.com/DeepLink?id=6e258a8d-0191-4ca0-bb23-c9fa65d48c86


Full written Recipe -- Chicken Ghee Roast
Prep time: 10-15 minutes (1-2 hours soaking time for chillies)
Cooking time: 40-45 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Ingredients:
Marination
CHICKEN | चिकन 1 KG (CURRY CUT)
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
CURD | दही 2 TBSP
Ghee Roast Paste
BYADGI RED CHILLI | ब्यादगी लाल मिर्च 25-30 NOS. 
GUNTUR RED CHILLI | गुंटूर लाल मिर्च 5 NOS. 
CASHEW | काजू 8 NOS. 
CORIANDER SEEDS | साबुत धनिया 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
BLACK PEPPERCORNS | साबुत काली मिर्च 1 TSP
POPPY SEEDS | खस खस 1 TSP
FENUGREEK SEEDS | मेथी के दाने A PINCH
GARLIC | लहसुन 20 CLOVES
TAMARIND | इमली SMALL LEMON SIZED BALL
JAGGERY | गुड़ 1 TBSP
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED (for grinding)
Cooking Chicken
GHEE | घी 1-2 TBSP
Final Cooking
GHEE | घी 4-5 TBSP (added in batches)
SALT | नमक TO TASTE 
CURRY LEAVES | कड़ी पत्ता A SMALL HANDFUL
Method:
Add washed & clean chicken into a large bowl, add all the ingredients of the marinade, mix well & let the chicken marinate in the fridge while you do the further cooking.
Deseed the byadgi red chillies by cutting the top & then cutting splitting them down the middle, add them into a bowl along with the Guntur chillies, cashews & submerge with hot water, cover & let them soak for 1-2 hours.
Once all the ingredients are soaked, set a pan over high flame, let it get hot then lower the flame & add coriander seeds, cumin seeds & black peppercorns, stir well & dry roast then while stirring continuously until fragrant.
Once they are roasted, add the poppy seeds, stir well & roast only for a few seconds then transfer the spices into a bowl & add the fenugreek seeds, let the spices cool down completely.
Add the roasted spices into a mixer jar along with soaked chillies & cashews, garlic, tamarind, jaggery & very little, grind all the ingredients into a thick, fine paste.
To cook the chicken, set a kadhai over high heat, add ghee & let it get hot. Then add the marinated chicken, stir & cook over high flame until the chicken is almost cooked (about 90%). Keep stirring the chicken, it will release some of its moisture, cook until the water gets evaporated & only ghee is left.
Further, switch off the flame, cover the chicken & set it aside until you cook the paste.
Set a tawa or any flat surfaced vessel over high flame, let it get hot then add 2-3 tbsp of ghee in the beginning & let the ghee heat up as well.
Next, add the prepared paste, stir well & cook over high while stirring continuously. You have to cook the paste until it turns crumbly, almost a jam like consistency & all the ghee gets separated. This process will take 15 minutes in total, depending upon how much water you have added.
After about 6-8 minutes, the paste will turn extremely dry, so to cook it further add 1-2 tbsp of ghee, stir well & continue to cook it further. Traditionally ghee is added, you can also add some hot water to cook it further.
Once the paste turns into a jam-like texture & all the ghee gets separated, you will see that the colour will also have deepened, at this stage, add the cooked chicken, stir well & cook the chicken in the ghee roast masala for 4-5 minutes.
Lastly taste & adjust salt if required & add curry leaves, stir well.
Your delicious, Kundapura Style Chicken Ghee Roast is ready, serve hot with some Neer Dosa or any Indian roti/bread of your choice.

title: Quick Pressure Cooker KHEER Recipe with JAGGERY PUDA (Malpua) | पंजाबी खीर पुडे़ | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Black Bowl - https://links.yflhome.com/yflhomeblackbowlyt

Full written recipe - Punjabi Kheer Puda

Prep time: 30-40 minutes (includes soaking & resting time)
Cooking time: 40-45 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Kheer
Ingredients:
TUKDA BASMATI | टुकड़ा बासमती 1/4 CUP
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED (for washing & soaking the rice)
MILK | दूध 1 LITRE (FULL FAT)
CONDENSED MILK | कंडेंस्ड मिल्क 200 ML / 275 GRAMS
ALMONDS | बादाम 1/4 CUP (SOAKED, PEELED & SLICED)
Method:
Wash & soak the rice in a bowl for 15-20 minutes. Then discard the water & add the soaked rice into a pressure cooker.
Further add the milk & stir it well. Put the cooker’s lid on & cook over high flame for exactly 5 minutes or until the pressure builds, then place the cooker on the smallest burner & cook it over the lowest flame for 30 minutes.
Then switch off the flame & let the cooker de-pressurize naturally. Open the pressure cooker’s lid & stir the kheer, the milk will have reduced & the colour has changed slightly. Switch on the flame & bring the kheer to a boil.
Further add the condensed milk & cook the kheer further, if you are going to serve it hot then cook it until the desired consistency is achieved, but if you are going to serve it cold then keep it slightly runny as the kheer will thicken up significantly once cooled. So, if you are going to serve it chilled, do no cook it for more them 6-8 minutes.
Lastly add the slivered almonds & your delicious Kheer is ready. Bring it down to room temperature & keep it in the fridge while you make the Puda.

Jaggery Pude
Ingredients:
JAGGERY | गुड़ 1/2 CUP OR 80 GRAMS (CHOPPED)
HOT WATER | गरम पानी 1 CUP 
SAFFRON | केसर A FEW STRANDS
WHEAT FLOUR | गेहूं का आटा 1 CUP / 120 GRAMS
FENNEL SEEDS | सौंफ 2 TSP (COARSELY CRUSHED)
CARDAMOM POWDER | इलायची पाउडर 1/4 TSP
BLACK PEPPERCORNS | साबुत काली मिर्च 1 TSP (COARSELY CRUSHED)
SALT | नमक A PINCH
WATER | पानी 3 TBSP OR AS REQUIRED (for adjusting consistency of the batter)
GHEE | घी AS REQUIRED (for cooking)
Method:
Add the hot water to the jaggery & add the saffron strands as well, stir it & let it rest for a couple of minutes until the jaggery melts completely & the water comes down to room temperature.
Meanwhile, add the wheat flour into a large bowl along with all the remaining fry ingredient & mix well.
Once the jaggery melts, add the jaggery water gradually into the bowl & whisk well to make lump-free smooth batter. Once you have added all the jaggery water & if the batter seems too thick, you can add more water, 1 tablespoon at a time, it should be a semi-thick flowing batter.
Cover & let the batter rest for 30 minutes.
To cook the puda, I prefer to shallow fry them on a tawa. Set a tawa over high flame & let it get got, then add 1-2 teaspoons of ghee & let it heat up.
Further pour a small ladle full of the batter, it will form into a circular shape on its own. I like to make mini pude, you can adjust the size as per your preference by adding more or less batter at a time. If you are making mini pude then you can cook multiple at a time like how I have.
Cook the pude over medium high flame until the turn crisp from once side, then flip & cook them similarly on the other side.
Your deliciousPudas are ready, serve them hot with some chilled kheer

title: Mutton Yakhni Pulao | BEST Lucknowi White Mutton Pulao Recipe | मटन यखनी पुलाव | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Mutton Yakhni Pulao 

Prep time: 10-15 minutes
Cooking time: 1 hour (includes soaking time)
Serves: 5-6 people

Soaking rice
BASMATI RICE | बासमती चावल 500 GRAMS  / 2.5 CUPS
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED (FOR WASHING & SOAKING)
Yakhni 
GHEE | घी 2 TSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP 
CORIANDER SEEDS | साबुत धनिया 2 TSP
FENNEL SEEDS | सौंफ 2 TSP
BLACK PEPPERCORNS | साबुत काली मिर्च 1 TSP
CLOVES | लौंग 4 NOS.
CINNAMON STICK | दालचीनी 1 INCH
STAR ANISE | चक्री फूल 1 NO.
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 1 NO.
GREEN CARDAMOM | हरी इलायची 3 PODS.
BLACK CARDAMOM | बड़ी इलायची 1 NO.
ONION | प्याज़ 1 LARGE. (ROUGHLY SLICED)
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH (ROUGHLY SLICED)
GARLIC | लहसुन 12-15 CLOVES.
MUTTON | मटन 750 GRAMS 
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
Final Cooking
YAKHNI | यखनी 3.75 CUPS / 900 GRAMS
GHEE | घी 2 TBSP
CARAWAY SEDS | शाह जीरा A PINCH 
ONION | प्याज़ 1 LARGE SIZED. (SLICED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (SLIT) 
CURD | दही 1/2 CUP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
KEWRA WATER | केवड़े का पानी 1 TSP 
Garnish
BIRISTA | बरिस्ता 
MINT | पुदीना 
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया 
Method:
Wash the basmati rice until the added water turns clear, let it soak for at least 30 minutes. Meanwhile you can continue the further recipe.
To make the yakhni, set a pressure cooker over high flame, add ghee & let it get hot.
Then add all the whole spices & let them crackle.
Then add onion, garlic, ginger & the mutton, stir well & cook for 3-4 minutes, do not let the ingredients brown.
Further add enough hot water, about 1 inch above the mutton, add salt & pressure cook over medium flame for 3 whistles only. The mutton only needs to be 90% cooked.
Once the whistles are done, switch off the flame & let the cooker depressurize naturally. Then open the lid & check the mutton, if it's still very raw then cook for 1 or 2 more whistles. It doesn't need to fall off the bone, but it should be fork tender.
Remove the mutton pieces into a separate bowl using tongs, then strain the broth using a sieve, gently press the remaining to squeeze out all the liquid, the broth should be clear. The yakhni for pulao is ready.
For this recipe ratio you need 3 and 3/4 cups or 3.75 cups of the yakhni, if there's any remaining you can have it as soup, it tastes incredible.
To make the pulao, heat ghee in a heavy-bottomed flat surfaced pot. Add cumin seeds & let them crackle.
Then add sliced onions & sauté until slightly light golden brown, no browning or fond should form at the bottom.
Once the onions are cooked, add green chilies, cooked mutton pieces, stir & saute for 2 minutes.
Then stir in the whisked curd & garam masal. Mix well & cook for 2-3 minutes until the curd's moisture evaporates.
Then add the measured yakhni & soaked basmati rice & gently mix.
Bring the pulao to a boil, then lower the heat, cover with a lid wrapped with a clean cloth & let it cook on a low flame for 15 minutes until the rice is done.
Once the rice is cooked, open the lid & add kewra water then put the lid back on & let the pulao rest for 20-30 minutes before fluffing it.
Once rested, gently stir from bottom to top using a spatula & fluff up the rice. Garnish with fried onions, chopped coriander, and mint leaves & served with raita. Your delicious, super fragrant & royal Mutton Yakhni Pulao is ready.

title: JAIPUR ki famous ALOO PYAAZ PANEER Ki SABJI | Dhaba Style आलू प्याज़ पनीर की सब्ज़ी | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Exciting News from  Cüraa by YFL Home!We’ve just added a brand-new Wooden Masala Dani to our collection, a perfect blend of tradition and elegance for your kitchen!Now available on yflhome.com and Amazon.Grab yours now ✨
Amazon - https://amzn.in/d/c9skfWi
Website - https://yflhome.com/products/curaa-wooden-masala-dani

Rajashthani Aloo Pyaaz Paneer ki Sabzi

Prep time: 10-15 minutes
Cooking time: 35-40 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Ingredients:
Gravy paste
ONION | प्याज़ 4 MEDIUM SIZED. (ROUGHLY CUT)
TOMATO | टमाटर 2 MEDIUM SIZED. (ROUGHLY CUT)
GARLIC | लहसुन 20-25 CLOVES.
LESS SPICY GREEN CHILLI | कम तीखी हरी मिर्च 4 NOS. (ROUGHLY CUT) 
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 5 NOS. (DESEEDED & SOAKED)
FRESH TURMERIC | कच्ची हल्दी 5 INCH
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED 
Tempering for gravy
GHEE | घी 1-2 TBSP
OIL | तेल 1 TSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 2 NOS. 
CINNAMON | दालचीनी 2 INCH
GREEN CARDAMOM | हरी इलायची 3 PODS.
BLACK CARDAMOM | बड़ी इलायची 1 NO. 
CORIANDER POWDER  | धनिया पाउडर 1 TBSP
SPICY RED CHILLI POWDER | तीखी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 TSP
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
Shallow frying
OIL | तेल AS REQUIRED 
PANEER  | पनीर 200 GRAMS (CUBES)
POTATO | आलू 2 MEDIUM SIZED. (QUARTERS)
ONION | प्याज़ 6 SMALL SIZED. 
Final Cooking
CURD | दही 1/2 CUP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी पाउडर A PINCH
LESS SPICY GREEN CHILLI | कम तीखी हरी मिर्च 4-5 NOS. (SLIT)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)

Method:
Add all the ingredients of the paste into a mixer jar & grind into a coarse paste using very little water, do not grind it into a fine paste.
Set a kadhai over high flame, add ghee & oil, let it get hot then add all the whole spices & let them crackle.
Further add the prepared paste along with salt, coriander powder & red chilli powder, stir well & cook over high flame for 2 minutes, then cover & cook over medium flame until you shallow fry the other ingredients.
Set a fry pan over high flame, add oil for shallow frying & let it get hot. 
Place the paneer cubes in the pan & fry them over medium high flame until they turn golden brown from all sides then transfer them into a bowl. Make sure to open the lid of the kadhai & stir the gravy at regular intervals.
In the same oil, add the potatoes carefully & fry them for 2-3 minutes over medium flame while stirring frequently until they start turning light golden brown, then set the flame to low, cover & cook over low flame until the potatoes get cooked. Check the gravy once.
Once the potatoes get fully cooked, transfer them into the same bowl.
Then in the same pan, add the onions & cook them over medium high flame until they light golden brown, transfer them into the same bowl.
Remove the lid & check the gravy, the ghee should've separated slightly.
Lower the flame at this stage & add the whisked curd, stir continuously until the curd gets incorporated then increase the flame & cook until the ghee separates.
Once the gravy is cooked, add hot water to adjust the consistency of the gravy, keep it semi-thick & not too runny.
Add the shallow fried paneer, potatoes & onions, stir well & cook over 3-4 minutes.
Lastly taste & adjust salt if required & add all the remaining ingredients, stir well. 
Your delicious Rajasthani Paneer Pyaaz Aloo ki Sabzi is ready, serve hot with Bejad ki Roti or any other millet roti.

title: BEST CHILLI CHICKEN Recipe | Restaurant Style | Soft Chicken Tips | चिली चिकन रेसिपी | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Restaurant Style Chilli Chicken & Gravy 

Prep time: 10-15 minutes
Cooking time: 25-30 minutes
Serves: 3-4 people

Cutting,coating & frying chicken
CHICKEN | चिकन 300 GRAMS (BREAST)
BAKING SODA | बेकिंग सोड़ा A PINCH
WATER | पानी 8-10 TBSP
SALT | नमक A LARGE PINCH 
WHITE PEPPER POWDER | सफेद मिर्च पाउडर A PINCH
LIGHT SOY SAUCE | लाइट सोया सॉस 1 TSP
OIL | तेल 1 TSP
CORN FLOUR | कॉर्न फ्लोर 1-2 TBSP
Quick Stock
HOT WATER  | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
STOCK CUBE | स्टॉक क्यूब 1 NO.
Corn flour slurry
CORN FLOUR | कॉर्न फ्लोर 2 TBSP
WATER | पानी 1-2 TBSP 
Chicken Chilli & Semi Gravy 
OIL | तेल 1-2 TBSP
GINGER | अदरक 1 INCH (CHOPPED)
GARLIC | लहसुन 20 CLOVES / 40 GRAMS (CHOPPED)
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 4-5 NOS. (SLIT)
CORIANDER STEM | धनिए के डंठल 1 TBSP (CHOPPED)
ONION | प्याज़ 1/2 NO. (THICK SLICED)
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1/2 NO. (THICK SLICED)
STOCK | स्टॉक AS REQUIRED 
LIGHT SOY SAUCE | लाइट सोया सॉस 2 TSP
DARK SOY SAUCE | डार्क सोया सॉस 2 TSP
VINEGAR | सिरका 1/4 TSP
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
WHITE PEPPER POWDER | सफेद मिर्च पाउडर A PINCH
SALT | नमक A PINCH
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (ROUGHLY CHOPPED)
SPRING ONION GREEN | हरे प्याज़ के पत्ते A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)

Method:
Before making any kind of Indo-Chinese recipe, make sure you prep all the ingredients and components before making the sauce. So cut all the veggies and remaining ingredients before coating & frying the chicken. 
Cut the chicken from the middle, the breast is usually thicker from the top, slice the thicker portion into two thin slices. You will get three slices of the chicken breast. Cut the chicken tender if it is attached to the breast first. 
Then cut the slices into strips against the fibres. Cut all the pieces similarly & add them into a bowl. 
Add baking soda and only 2-3 tbsp of water first, then using clean hands stir the chicken vigorously in a circular motion & allow the chicken pieces to absorb the water. This process is called velveting of the chicken. Repeat this process 2-3 times once the chicken absorbs the water. After repeating the process it will look like you have added egg whites to the chicken, it will turn slimy.
Once that's done, add salt, white pepper powder, soy sauce, oil & corn flour, mix well to coat the chicken, it only needs a very thin layer of coating.
To fry the chicken, heat oil in a kadhai until it gets moderately hot (165° C). Then carefully add the chicken in batches & fry over high flame until it turns light golden brown, it will only take 3-4 minutes for the chicken to cook so do not overcook it.
Remove the fried chicken into a sieve & fry the remaining batches similarly.
To make a quick stock I usually like to use a stock cube, so just bring some water to a boil in a stock pot & add the stock cube. This also helps to elevate the flavour of the recipe.
Make the corn flour slurry by just mixing corn flour & water into a bowl, keep it aside until further use. 

To make Chilli Chicken, set a wok or a kadhai over high heat & let it get hot. Then add the oil & let the oil heat up as well.
Further add, ginger, garlic, coriander stems & stir well, saute over high flame for 2-3 minutes, don't brown the garlic.
Next, add the onion & capsicum slices, stir well & sauce for a minute.
Then add the stock to make the sauce, if you are making chilli chicken dry add only about 250-300ml of stock and if you are making gravy then add 700-800ml of stock or more according to your preference.
Add light & dark soy sauce, vinegar, sugar ,white pepper powder & salt, stir well & bring the sauce to a simmer.
Then add the fried chicken, roughly cut fresh coriander & spring onion whites, stir well & coat the chicken.
Then add the corn flour slurry gradually while stirring continuously until the sauce becomes thick & coats the chicken. You will need to add more slurry if you are making gravy.
Once the desired consistency is achieved, taste & adjust seasoning as required & garnish with spring onion greens.
Your delicious Restaurant Style Chilli Chicken Dry/Gravy is ready.

title: Easy Vegetable Upma Recipe | TIPS for Soft & Moist Upma | परफेक्ट मुलायम उपमा | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Amazon: Shop now - https://amzn.in/d/hzRiMNf 

Full written recipe - Vegetable Upma 

Prep time: 10-15 minutes
Cooking time: 10-15 minutes
Serves: 4-5 people

Ingredients:
Roating the Rawa
GHEE | घी 1 TSP
UPMA RAWA | उपमा रवा 1 CUP
Tempering & cooking
CASHEW | काजू 10 NOS.
GHEE | घी 2 TBSP
PEANUTS | मूंगफली 1 TBSP
MUSTARD SEEDS | राई 1 TSP
URAD DAL | उरद दाल 1 TSP
CHANA DAL | चना दाल 1 TSP
GINGER | अदरक 1 TSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (CHOPPED)
ONION | प्याज़ 1 MEDIUM SIZED. (CHOPPED)
CURRY LEAVES | कड़ी पत्ता 10-12 NOS.
FRENCH BEANS | फ्रेंच बीन्स 5-6 NOS. (DICED)
CARROT | गाजर 1 SMALL SIZED (DICED)
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1/2 MEDIUM SIZED OR 1 SMALL (DICED)
GREEN PEAS | हरे मटर 1/4 CUP
HOT WATER | गर्म पानी 3 CUPS
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
BLACK PEPPER | काली मिर्च 1/2 TSP (FRESHLY CRUSHED)
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF HALF LEMON
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
GHEE | घी 1 TSP (OPTIONAL)

Method:
Before making the upma, make sure that you cut the veggies into small dices. You can mix all the veggies into one bowl as they will be added together, just keep the onion separately.
Set a fry pan over medium heat, once it gets slightly hot add ghee & let it get hot, then add the rawa & roast it over medium to low flame for 3-4 minutes while stirring it continuously. 
Once roasted, transfer the rawa into a bowl & set it aside to cool down. It is very important that you use upma rawa and not fine rawa.
To fry the nuts, set a kadhai over high flame then add the ghee & let it get moderately hot. Then add the cashews & peanuts, fry them over medium to low flame until they turn light golden brown, then transfer them into a bowl & set it aside. 
Now in the same kadhai, add mustard seeds & let them crackle, then add the urad dal & chana dal, stir & cook over low flame until the dals get light golden brown. 
Further add the ginger, green chilli & onion, stir well & cook over high flame until the onion turns translucent, then add the curry leaves & stir well. 
Then add all the veggies & cook them over a high flame for 2-3 minutes. 
Then measure & add the water along with salt, sugar & black pepper, let the water come to a rolling boil.
The perfect ratio of Rawa to Water for the perfect upma is 1:3. So 1 cup of rawa & 3 cups of water. Use the same cup measure to measure both.
Then add the roasted rawa while stirring it continuously to avoid lumps, cook over medium high flame while stirring continuously until there is no separate water visible.
Then cover & cook over low flame for 4-5 minutes, open the lid & stir it once after 2 minutes.
Once cooked over low flame, remove the lid & stir the upma, then put the lid back on, switch off the flame & let it rest for 5 minutes, this step is very important.
Next, remove the lid & add the fried nuts, lemon juice, fresh coriander & ghee, stir well.
Your perfect, melt in the mouth Vegetable Upma is ready, serve it hot with some coconut chutney & sambar.

title: Dosa Batter in 1 MINUTE | Healthy Green Sprouts Dosa | इंस्टेंट मूंग स्प्राउट्स दोसा | Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written Recipe - Green Moong Sprouts Dosa/Cheela

Prep time: 5-10 minutes (Using market bought Sprouts)
Cooking time: 5-10 minutes
Serves: 5-6 people

Ingredients:
Batter
GREEN MOONG SPROUTS | हरा मूंग के अंकुर 2 CUPS
GINGER | अदरक 1 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 1 NO.
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A SMALL HANDFUL
MINT LEAVES | पुदीना A SMALL HANDFUL
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A PINCH
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
BLACK PEPPER | काली मिर्च 1/2 TSP (FRESHLY CRUSHED)
WATER | पानी AS REQUIRED
ICE CUBE | बर्फ का टुकड़ा 1 NO.
Plain Dosa
GHEE | घी AS REQUIRED (for cooking)
Paneer Podi Dosa
PANEER | पनीर AS REQUIRED (GRATED)
MILAGAI PODI | मिलगायि पोड़ी A LARGE PINCH
GHEE | घी AS REQUIRED (for cooking)
Vegetable Mixture For Topping
CABBAGE | पत्ता गोभी 1/4 MEDIUM SIZED.
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1/2 MEDIUM SIZED.
CARROT | गाजर 1 MEDIUM SIZED.
GINGER | अदरक 2 INCH
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS.
PANEER | पनीर 200 GRAMS (GRATED)
Vegetable Dosa:
GHEE | घी AS REQUIRED (for cooking?
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
SALT | नमक A PINCH
BLACK PEPPER | काली मिर्च A PINCH (FRESHLY CRUSHED)

Method:
To sprout green moong dal:
Soak 1 cup (about 180–200 grams) of whole green moong dal in water for 6–7 hours. Strain the water, tie the soaked dal in a muslin cloth, and keep it covered in a warm place for a day or until it sprouts. This will yield approximately 2 cups (about 400 grams) of sprouts.
You can also directly use market bought sprouts instead, it makes the process super quick.
To make the batter just blend all the ingredients using a mixer grinder. Use very little water and make a thick, dosa consistency batter. The batter is ready, it's that quick!
Now to make plain dosa, heat the dosa tawa until it's hot, sprinkle some water to check, the water should sizzle and evaporate slowly. 
Pour a ladle full of batter into the tawa & spread it like a dosa, set the flame to medium & let the surface set, then add ghee as required & cook the dosa over medium to low heat until it gets crisp from the bottom. 
Once crisp, fold & remove the dosa from the pan, serve hot with some coconut chutney.
To make paneer podi dosa, add a ladle full of the batter onto the hot tawa, spread it like an uthappa, keep it thick.
Then grate paneer on the dosa and add a generous amount of the podi, add ghee & cook over medium to low heat until it gets crisp from the bottom, then remove from the tawa & serve. 
To the vegetable topping for vegetable dosa, add all the veggies into a chopper and chop them finely. Transfer them into a bowl & add the grated paneer, mix well. Do not add any salt at this stage. 
Pour a ladle full of batter on the tawa & spread it into a dosa & add the topping evenly on the surface, press it gently so that it doesn’t fall off.
Add fresh coriander, salt, black pepper & ghee on the top & cook over medium flame until the cheela becomes light golden brown from the bottom then flip it using a spatula & cook on the other side for 2-3 minutes until the veggies get cooked.
Once cooked, flip the cheela again & roll it, transfer it onto a chopping board & cut it into pieces.
Your delicious vegetable & paneer sprouts dosa is ready, serve hot with coconut chutney.

title: Easy Vegetable Poha | Quick & Healthy Breakfast Recipe | हेल्थी वेजिटेबल पोहा | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Vegetable Poha 
Prep time: 10-15 minutes
Cooking time: 15-20 minutes
Serves: 4-5 people

Ingredients:
Soaking & Veggies Prep
POHA | पोहा 3 CUPS
ONION | प्याज़ 1 MEDIUM SIZED. 
POTATO | आलू 1 MEDIUM SIZED. 
FRENCH BEANS | फ्रेंच बींस A HANDFUL 
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1/2 NO.
CARROT | गाजर 1/2 NO.
SWEET CORN | स्वीट कॉर्न 1/3 CUP 
GREEN PEAS | हरे मटर 1/3 CUP
Tempering & cooking
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1/2 TSP
MUSTARD SEEDS | राई 1/2 TSP
CURRY LEAVES | कड़ी पत्ता 15 NOS.
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 3 NOS. (DICED)
PEANUTS | मूंगफली 1/4 CUP (OPTIONAL)
WATER | पानी A SPLASH
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF 1 LEMON
SUGAR | शक्कर 1 TSP
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
SALT | नमक IF REQUIRED 
SUGAR | शक्कर IF REQUIRED 
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Method:
While making poha, always make sure that you get the thick variety of poha, Jada Poha. The other variety is thin which is used to make chivda.
Place a large sieve on a bowl, add the poha along with water & gently rinse the poha in the water to get rid of the excess starch. Lift the sieve up & let all the excess water drain out, place the sieve with the poha on to an empty bowl or a plate & let it rest for 10-15 minutes or until you prepare the veggies.
Cut all the veggies into small dice & chop the onion. Keep the onion in a separate bowl, potato in a separate bowl & you can mix all the other veggies in a common bowl or a plate.
Once the poha has rested, gently mix it using your hand to fluff it up, this is the perfect way to soak the poha, you’ll see that they won’t turn out sticky or clumpy.
Set a kadhai over high flame, once it gets hot, add the oil & heat it well.
Further add cumin seeds, mustard seeds, green chill, curry leaves & peanuts, mix well & cook over low flame briefly & then add the potatoes.
Cook the potatoes over high flame until they are half cooked, make sure you half cook the potatoes before adding the onions, if you add potatoes & onion together then the onions will get overcooked.
Once the potatoes are half done, add in the chopped onion, stir well & cook until the onion turns almost light golden brown over high flame.
Next, add all the prepared veggies, stir well & cook over high flame for 1-2 minutes, then add a splash of hot water, cover & cook over low flame for 3-4 minutes until the carrots & the beans get cooked.
Once the veggies get cooked, remove the lid, lower the flame at this stage & add salt & turmeric powder, mix well & add the soaked poha along with lemon juice, sugar & fresh coriander, stir everything very gently, then you can taste & adjust salt & sugar as per your taste preference.
Further add a splash of hot water over the poha & cover with a lid, switch off the flame & let the poha rest for 3-4 minutes, following this step will ensure that the poha turns out to be very moist & fluffy due to the steam.
Remove the lid after 3-4 minutes & sprinkle some freshly chopped coriander & your delicious & healthy vegetable poha is ready. I like to add some sev & fresh pomegranate while serving.

title: The Spiciest Egg Curry You'll Ever Make! 🔥 | Restaurant Style ANDA KOLHAPURI by Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written recipe - Kolhapuri Egg Curry

Prep time: 25-30 minutes
Cooking time: 40-45 minutes
Serve: 6-8 people

Ingredients:
Paste
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
CORIANDER SEEDS | साबुत धनिया 1 TBSP
CLOVES | लौंग 4-5 NOS. 
BLACK PEPPERCORNS | साबुत काली मिर्च 4-5 NOS.
BLACK CARDAMOM | बड़ी इलायची 1 NO.
GREEN CARDAMOM | हरी इलायची 2-3 NOS. 
CINNAMON | दालचीनी 1 INCH 
SPICY RED CHILLI | तीखी लाल मिर्च 3-4 NOS. 
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 7-8 NOS.
FRESH COCONUT | ताज़ा नारियल 1/2 CUP (GRATED)
WHITE SESAME SEEDS | सफेद तिल 1 TSP 
POPPY SEEDS | खस खस 1 TSP
TOMATO | टमाटर 5-6 NOS.
GARLIC | लहसुन 10-12 CLOVES
CASHEW | काजू 20-25 NOS.
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
Tempering & Gravy
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1/2 TSP
RED CHILLI | लाल मिर्च 2 NOS. 
BAY LEAF | तेज पत्ता 1 NO. 
ONION | प्याज़ 3 MEDIUM SIZED. (CHOPPED)
GINGER GARLIC PASTE | अदरक लहसुन की पेस्ट 2 TBSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 3 NOS. (CHOPPED)
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TBSP
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH 
Tossing Veggies & eggs
BUTTER | मक्खन 2 TBSP
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1 MEDIUM SIZED. (PETALS)
ONION | प्याज़ 1 MEDIUM SIZED. (PETALS)
BOILED EGGS | उबले हुए अंडे 8 NOS. 
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर A PINCH
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A PINCH 
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Final additions
FRESH CREAM | फ्रेश क्रीम 2-3 TBSP
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर A PINCH
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF HALF A LEMON
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Method:
Set a saucepan/kadhai over high flame & let it got, then add oil & let the oil heat up as well.
Once the oil gets hot, add the whole spices followed by all the remaining ingredients of the paste.
Stir well & cook over high flame for 4-5 minutes.
Add hot water, then cover & cook the mixture over medium flame until the tomatoes turn completely mushy, this process will take about 8-10 minutes. 
Switch off the flame & let the mixture cool down completely, then add it into a mixer grinder jar & blend it into a fine paste using water as required.
Set a kadhai over high flame, add oil & let it heat up.
Next, add the cumin seeds, let them crackle then add red chilli, bay leaf & onions, stir well & cook the onions over medium high flame until they turn light golden brown.
Add the ginger garlic paste, green chillies, stir & continue to cook further until the onions turn completely golden brown. 
Further, lower the flame & add turmeric powder & kashmiri red chilli powder along with a splash of hot water, stir & then cook over high flame until the oil separates, this will only take 1-2 minutes. 
Next, add the prepared paste along with a large lunch of salt, stir well & cook over high flame for 1-2 minutes, then cover & cook over medium flame until the oil separates, remove the lid & stir the gravy at regular intervals & if it gets too dry, add some hot water & continue to cook further.
Once the gravy is cooked, add hot water to adjust the consistency of the gravy, you can keep it as per your preference but it's usually semi-thick & not too runny. 
Taste & adjust salt if required & add some sugar to balance the tanginess, the base gravy for the recipe is recipe, set the flame to low or you can even switch it off while you toss the veggies & eggs. 
Set a fry pan over high flame, let it heat up & then add the butter, let the butter get hot.
Then add the capsicum, onion, boiled eggs, powdered spices & fresh coriander toss over high flame for 1-2 minutes, then add it into the gravy.
Also add the final ingredients, stir well & your delicious, spicy Kolhapuri Egg Curry is ready, serve it with butter naan or tandoori roti.

title: Cooker में DESI RED SAUCE PASTA in MINUTES | NO BOILING | कुकर में झटपट पास्ता | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written Recipe - Pressure Cooker Desi Red Sauce Pasta

Prep time: 5-10 minutes
Cooking time: 10-15 minutes
Serve: 4-5 people

Ingredients:
ONION | प्याज़ 2 SMALL SIZED. 
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS.
GARLIC | लहसुन 12-15 CLOVES
TOMATO | टमाटर 3 NOS. 
CARROT | गाजर 1 MEDIUM SIZED.
FRENCH BEANS | फ्रेंच बींस A HANDFUL 
CAPSICUM | शिमला मिर्च 1 MEDIUM SIZED.
SWEET CORN | स्वीट कॉर्न 1/4 CUP 
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP 
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1/2 TSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/4 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 TSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 1 TSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/4 TSP
SALT | नमक A PINCH 
KETCHUP | कैचअप 3-4 TBSP
LIGH SOY SAUCE | लाइट सोया सॉस 1/4 TSP (OPTIONAL)
PASTA | पास्ता 200 GRAMS
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH 
OREGANO | ऑरिगेनो 1/2 TSP
CHILLI FLAKES | चिली फ्लेक्स 1/2 TSP
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL 
SPRING ONION GREENS | हरे प्याज़ के पत्ते A HANDFUL 

Method:
Add the onions, garlic & green chilli into a chopper & finely chop them, transfer into a bowl.
In the same chopper add the tomatoes & chop them finely too.
Cut the vegetables into small dices, you can also add more veggies of your choice. 
Set the pressure cooker over high flame & let it get hot, then add the oil & let the oil heat up as well.
Add the cumin seeds & let them crackle, then add the chopped onion mixture & cook over high flame until the onions turn slightly light golden brown. 
Then lower the flame & add all the powdered spices along with a splash of hot water, still well & cool the spices over high flame for 1-2 minutes. 
Next, add the tomatoes along with a pinch of salt, stir well & cool the tomatoes until the oil separates.
Add ketchup, light soy sauce, veggies & preferred choice of paste & gently stir & mix everything.
Further add hot water, the water should completely cover all the added ingredients, do not add a lot of water.
Stir well & taste, add salt if required then put the lid on & pressure cook the pasta over medium flame for just 1 whistle (you can cook for another whistle if the first one goes off too early).
Then switch off the flame & let the cooker depressurize naturally.
Once depressurized, remove the lid & gently stir the pasta.
Give it a taste, adjust salt again if required & lastly add sugar, oregano,chilli flakes, fresh coriander & spring onion greens, stir well. You can also add processed cheese as required at this stage & mix it, I prefer to add it while serving.
Your delicious & super quick Desi Red Sauce pasta in the pressure cooker is ready.

title: Mushroom Pepper Fry Recipe | Easy Spicy Mushroom Masala | मशरूम काली मिर्च मसाला | Chef Sanjyot Keer
description:
Full written Recipe - Mushroom Pepper Fry
Prep time: 10-15 minutes
Cooking time: 20-25 minutes
Serves: 3-4 people

Ingredients:
Pepper Fry Masala
BLACK PEPPERCORNS | साबुत काली मिर्च 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा 1 TSP
FENNEL SEEDS | सौंफ 1 TSP
Mushroom Pepper Fry
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
CUMIN SEEDS | जीरा A PINCH
FENNEL SEEDS | मेथी के बीज A PINCH
CURRY LEAVES | कड़ी पत्ता 15-20 NOS. 
GARLIC | लहसुन 1 TBSP (CHOPPED)
GARLIC | लहसुन 15 CLOVES
ONION | प्याज़ 3 MEDIUM SIZED. (CHOPPED)
GINGER GARLIC GEEEN CHILLI PASTE | अदरक लहसुन मिर्च की पेस्ट 2 TBSP
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1/2 TSP
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला 1/2 TSP
PEPPER SPICE MIX | काली मिर्च वाला मसाला HALF QUANTITY 
HOT WATER | गरम पानी A SPLASH 
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
MUSHROOM | मशरूम 500 GRAMS (DICED) 
PEPPER SPICE MIX | काली मिर्च वाला मसाला REMAINING QUANTITY 
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 4-5 NOS. (SLIT)
CURRY LEAVES | कड़ी पत्ता 15-20 NOS. 
LEMON JUICE | नींबू का रस OF 1/2 A LEMON
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
Method:
Set a small pan over high heat & once it gets hot, lower the flame & add fennel seeds, cumin seeds & black peppercorns, keep stirring & dry roast them over low flame until the cumin seeds turn light brown, then transfer them into a bowl, cool them down completely & grind into a fine powder.
Set a fry pan over high heat, add oil & let it get hot.
Add cumin & fennel seeds, garlic & curry leaves, stir well & cook briefly.
Then add the onions, stir & cook over high heat until the onions turn light golden brown, then add the ginger garlic & green chilli paste, stir & cook for 1-2 minutes, allow the onions to brown further.
Then lower the flame, add turmeric powder, garam masala, pepper fry masala & splash of hot water stir & cook the spices over high flame for 1-2 minutes, then add salt.
Once the masala is cooked, add the cut mushrooms, stir well & cook over high flame for 4-5 minutes, then cover & cook over low flame for 2 minutes, the mushrooms will release all their moisture.
Open the lid & cook over high flame until the water gets evaporated, then add the remaining pepper fry masala, green chilli, curry leaves, lemon juice & fresh coriander, stir well.
Taste & adjust salt if required & your delicious mushroom pepper fry is ready, serve hot with some parotta, appam or neer dosa. You can also have this dish as a starter.

title: Quickest Chicken Curry | Instant Pressure Cooker Recipe | सबसे आसान झटपट चिकन करी | Chef Sanyot Keer
description:
Full written Recipe - Quickest Chicken Curry
Prep time: 5-10 minutes
Cooking time: 20-25 minutes
Serves: 4-5 people

Ingredients:
CHICKEN | चिकन 1 KG (CURRY CUT)
SALT | नमक TO TASTE
POWDERED SPICES
TURMERIC POWDER | हल्दी पाउडर 1 TSP
KASHMIRI RED CHILLI POWDER | कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 TBSP
SPICY RED CHILLI POWDER | तीखी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 TSP
CORIANDER POWDER | धनिया पाउडर 2 TBSP
CHICKEN MASALA | चिकन मसाला 2 TBSP
CUMIN POWDER | जीरा पाउडर 1/2 TSP 
GINGER GARLIC PASTE | अदरक लहसुन मिर्च की पेस्ट 3 TBSP
GREEN CHILLI | हरी मिर्च 2 NOS. (SLIT)
FRESH CORIANDER | हरा धनिया A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
MINT | पुदीना A HANDFUL (CHOPPED)
OIL | तेल 2 TBSP
GHEE | घी 2 TBSP
CURD | दही 350 GRAMS (WHISKED)
HOT WATER | गरम पानी AS REQUIRED 
ROASTED KASURI METHI POWDER | भुनी कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर A LARGE PINCH
GARAM MASALA | गरम मसाला A PINCH
SUGAR | शक्कर A PINCH
Method:
Add the chicken into a large bowl, cut the tendons on the leg bone if you are using whole leg pieces(drumsticks). Add salt, all the powdered spices, ginger garlic paste, green chilli, fresh coriander, mint, oil, ghee, whisked curd & mix everything using your hand or a spatula.
You can let the chicken marinate at this stage if you have the time, this is all that this recipe requires, it is super easy.
To cook the curry, set a pressure cooker over high flame & let is get hot. Then add the chicken, stir well & cook over high flame for 4-5 minutes.
Next add hot water according to the consistency you prefer, I like the final consistency to be slightly thin so I add hot water until the level reaches just below the chicken. Place the lid & pressure cook the chicken over medium flame for 2-3 whistles. If the chicken is of good quality, then 2 whistles are enough.
Switch off the flame & let the cooker de-pressurize naturally, then open the lid & switch on the flame to high.
You can adjust the consistency of the curry at this stage, if you want it to be thicker you can cook over high flame for a couple of minutes so that the curry reduces & thicken. If you want it to be even thinner then you can add more hot water.
Taste & adjust salt if required & add kasuri methi powder, garam masala, sugar, fresh coriander & stir well.
Quickest & possibly the simplest chicken curry is ready, serve it with roti, paratha & rice.
